papers.title: Computing Equilibrium beyond Unilateral Deviation
papers.abstract: Most familiar equilibrium concepts, such as Nash and correlated equilibrium, guarantee only that no single player can improve their utility by deviating unilaterally. They offer no guarantees against profitable coordinated deviations by coalitions. Although the literature proposes solution concepts that provide stability against multilateral deviations (\emph{e.g.}, strong Nash and coalition-proof equilibrium), these generally fail to exist. In this paper, we study an alternative solution concept that minimizes coalitional deviation incentives, rather than requiring them to vanish, and is therefore guaranteed to exist. Specifically, we focus on minimizing the average gain of a deviating coalition, and extend the framework to weighted-average and maximum-within-coalition gains. In contrast, the minimum-gain analogue is shown to be computationally intractable. For the average-gain and maximum-gain objectives, we prove a lower bound on the complexity of computing such an equilibrium and present an algorithm that matches this bound. Finally, we use our framework to solve the \emph{Exploitability Welfare Frontier} (EWF), the maximum attainable social welfare subject to a given exploitability (the maximum gain over all unilateral deviations).
papers.chineseTitle: 超越单边偏离计算均衡
papers.chineseAbstract: 大多数熟悉的均衡概念，如纳什均衡和相关均衡，仅保证没有单个参与者能够通过单方面偏离来提高其效用。它们对于联盟通过协调偏离获得利润的情况没有提供任何保障。尽管文献中提出了能够提供对多边偏离稳定性的解决方案概念（例如强纳什均衡和联盟证明均衡），但这些概念通常并不存在。在本文中，我们研究了一种替代的解决方案概念，它最小化联盟偏离的激励，而不是要求它们消失，因此保证存在。具体而言，我们专注于最小化偏离联盟的平均收益，并将框架扩展到加权平均和联盟内最大收益。相比之下，最小收益的类似物被证明在计算上是难以处理的。对于平均收益和最大收益目标，我们证明了计算这种均衡的复杂性的下限，并提出了一个与该下限相匹配的算法。最后，我们使用我们的框架来解决“可利用性福利前沿”（EWF），即在给定可利用性（所有单边偏离中的最大收益）下可达到的最大社会福利。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出了新的均衡概念，创新性显著，方法严谨，但实证部分较弱，可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出最小化联盟偏离激励的均衡概念，并解决EWF问题。

papers.title: Sequential Estimation of Dynamic Discrete Choice Models with Unobserved Heterogeneity
papers.abstract: Estimating dynamic discrete choice models with unobserved heterogeneity is computationally costly because it requires repeatedly solving fixed-point equations for all unobserved types. We develop the EM-NPL(q) framework that combines the Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm with an inner fixed-point solver truncated to q iterations. For the workhorse class of linear-in-parameters models, we establish a truncation-invariance result: for any q$\geq$1, EM-NPL(q) is numerically identical to the EM-NPL estimator that solves the inner fixed-point problem to convergence. Therefore, the choice of q affects computation but not statistical properties. We also establish consistency, asymptotic normality of our estimator, and local convergence of the EM-NPL(q) algorithm. In Monte Carlo simulations, EM-NPL(q) reduces runtime by at least 20% and can be 3--5 times faster. In an application to cola demand, we show that ignoring unobserved heterogeneity understates long-run own-price elasticities by up to 60%, short-run elasticities by up to 85%, and compensating variation from a soda tax by up to 90%.
papers.chineseTitle: 具有未观测异质性的动态离散选择模型的序列估计
papers.chineseAbstract: 由于需要对所有未观测类型反复求解不动点方程，估计具有未观测异质性的动态离散选择模型计算成本高昂。本文开发了EM-NPL(q)框架，该框架将期望最大化（EM）算法与截断为q次迭代的内层不动点求解器相结合。对于参数线性模型这一主要类别，本文证明了截断不变性结果：对于任何q≥1，EM-NPL(q)在数值上与将内层不动点问题求解至收敛的EM-NPL估计量相同。因此，q的选择影响计算但不影响统计性质。本文还证明了估计量的一致性、渐近正态性，以及EM-NPL(q)算法的局部收敛性。在蒙特卡洛模拟中，EM-NPL(q)将运行时间至少减少了20%，速度可达原来的3-5倍。在应用于可乐需求的案例中，本文表明忽略未观测异质性会低估长期自身价格弹性高达60%，短期弹性高达85%，以及汽水税的补偿变化高达90%。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出EM-NPL(q)框架，降低计算成本，提高估计效率。

papers.title: Subsampling Under Two-way Clustering with Serial Correlation
papers.abstract: We prove the validity of using subsampling method for inference under a two-way clustered panel in which the time effects are serially correlated. Subsamples should be drawn without replacement from randomly partitioned individual index set and consecutive blocks of time effects. We present two subsampling inference methods: estimating the quantiles directly and constructing the confidence interval by first estimating the asymptotic variance. The quantile method is very adaptive, allowing for non-Gaussian limit which invalidates all existing methods in two-way clustering with serial correlation. Although the variance method only works under Gaussian limit, it comes with a data-driven bandwidth selection algorithm and a bias-correction under suitable estimators. Monte Carlo simulations demonstrate our methods exhibiting the desired coverage level in the finite sample except when the serial correlation is extremely strong. This paper is the first one that allows for inference on non-Gaussian asymptotics under two-way clustering with serial correlation.
papers.chineseTitle: 在具有序列相关性的双向聚类下进行子抽样
papers.chineseAbstract: 我们证明了在具有序列相关性的双向聚类面板数据中使用子抽样方法进行推断的有效性。子样本应从随机划分的个体索引集和连续的时间效应块中无放回地抽取。我们提出了两种子抽样推断方法：直接估计分位数和通过首先估计渐近方差来构建置信区间。分位数方法具有很强的适应性，允许非高斯极限，这在具有序列相关性的双向聚类中使所有现有方法失效。尽管方差方法仅在高斯极限下有效，但它配备了一个数据驱动的带宽选择算法和在适当估计量下的偏差校正。蒙特卡洛模拟表明，除了序列相关性极强的情况外，我们的方法在有限样本中表现出了期望的覆盖水平。本文是第一篇允许在具有序列相关性的双向聚类下对非高斯渐近性进行推断的论文。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在方法论和新颖性上表现突出，实证稍弱，整体清晰易懂，具有较大影响力。
papers.summary: 首次允许在双向聚类序列相关性下对非高斯渐近性进行推断。

papers.title: Measuring Choice Difficulty
papers.abstract: We provide a theoretical framework to understand how widely used measures of choice difficulty relate. In a binary-option Bayesian expected-utility framework, we show that three measures of difficulty, (i) understanding (ex-ante value), (ii) choice randomness, and (iii) confidence that the chosen option is ex post correct, are, in general, unrelated, and that this result extends to other potential measures like attenuation. We provide intuitive sufficient conditions which align the orders, using both restrictions on Blackwell experiments that capture well known classes (such as logit) and restrictions on payoffs and demonstrate that in psychophysical tasks that pay only for correctness, confidence coincides with understanding. We show willingness-to-accept to switch, when measured in utils, is equivalent to understanding. Our results suggest caution in interpreting measures of choice difficulty as well as the degree of portability between economics and psychophysics experiments
papers.chineseTitle: 衡量选择难度
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文提供了一个理论框架，以理解广泛使用的选择难度度量之间的关系。在一个二元选项的贝叶斯期望效用框架中，我们展示了三种难度度量：（i）理解（事前价值），（ii）选择随机性，以及（iii）对所选选项事后正确的信心，在一般情况下是无关的，并且这一结果扩展到其他潜在度量，如衰减。我们提供了直观的充分条件，通过限制捕捉已知类别（如逻辑回归）的布莱克威尔实验以及限制收益，使这些度量顺序一致，并证明在仅按正确性付费的心理物理任务中，信心与理解相吻合。我们表明，当以效用单位衡量时，愿意接受的转换与理解等价。我们的研究结果提示，在解释选择难度度量以及经济学与心理物理实验之间的可移植性程度时需谨慎。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在理论上有显著创新，方法严谨，但实证部分稍显薄弱，整体影响较大，可读性良好。
papers.summary: 提供理论框架理解选择难度度量间的关系。

papers.title: Bootstrap Inference in Nonlinear Panel Data Models with Interactive Fixed Effects
papers.abstract: The maximum likelihood estimator in nonlinear panel data models with interactive fixed effects is biased. Several bias correction methods, such as analytical and jackknife approaches, have been proposed to enable valid inference. This paper shows that the parametric bootstrap also enables valid inference in such models. In particular, we show that the parametric bootstrap replicates the asymptotic distribution of the maximum likelihood estimator. Therefore, it yields asymptotically unbiased estimates and confidence sets with asymptotically correct coverage. We also propose a transformation-based bootstrap confidence interval that delivers improved finite-sample performance. Simulation results support the theoretical findings. Finally, we apply the proposed method to examine technological and product market spillover effects on firms' innovation behavior.
papers.chineseTitle: 具有交互固定效应的非线性面板数据模型中的自助推断法
papers.chineseAbstract: 在具有交互固定效应的非线性面板数据模型中，最大似然估计量存在偏差。为了进行有效的推断，已经提出了几种偏差校正方法，如解析法和刀切法。本文表明，参数自助法也能在此类模型中实现有效推断。具体而言，我们证明了参数自助法能够复制最大似然估计量的渐近分布，从而得出渐近无偏的估计量和具有渐近正确覆盖率的置信集。此外，我们还提出了一种基于变换的自助置信区间，该方法在有限样本下表现更佳。模拟结果支持了理论发现。最后，我们应用所提出的方法来研究技术和产品市场溢出效应对企业创新行为的影响。
papers.scoreReasoning: 方法创新性强，实证较扎实，但影响力和可读性尚有提升空间。
papers.summary: 提出参数自助法在非线性面板数据模型中实现有效推断。

papers.title: Doubly robust local projections difference-in-differences
papers.abstract: This paper develops a doubly robust extension of local-projections difference-in-differences (LP-DiD) for staggered absorbing treatments. The resulting estimator, DRLPDID, preserves the LP-DiD local-stack ATT target and is consistent when either the local untreated-outcome regression or the local treatment-probability model is correctly specified. It also delivers influence-function-based inference for post-treatment summaries and multiplier-bootstrap bands for dynamic paths. In Monte Carlo designs with covariate-driven selection, DRLPDID matches regression-adjusted LP-DiD under outcome-model alignment and clearly outperforms the IPT-only variant under propensity-score misspecification. In the no-fault-divorce application, DRLPDID tracks robust staggered-adoption estimators and is less negative than unadjusted LP-DiD.
papers.chineseTitle: 双重稳健局部投影双重差分法
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文针对交错吸收处理，开发了一种局部投影双重差分法（LP-DiD）的双重稳健扩展方法。所得估计量DRLPDID保留了LP-DiD的局部堆叠平均处理效应（ATT）目标，并且当局部未处理结果回归或局部处理概率模型中任意一个被正确指定时，该估计量是一致的。此外，该方法还为处理后汇总统计量提供了基于影响函数的推断，并为动态路径提供了乘数自助法置信区间。在协变量驱动选择的蒙特卡洛设计中，当结果模型对齐时，DRLPDID与回归调整后的LP-DiD相匹配，而在倾向得分错误指定的情况下，其表现明显优于仅使用逆概率加权（IPT）的变体。在无过错离婚应用中，DRLPDID与稳健的交错采用估计量保持一致，且比未调整的LP-DiD更不负面。
papers.scoreReasoning: 方法论创新显著，实证较扎实，但实证部分可进一步丰富。
papers.summary: 提出DRLPDID，双重稳健估计交错吸收处理效应。

papers.title: Treatment-effect heterogeneity and interactive fixed effects: Can we control for too much?
papers.abstract: This paper studies the interactive fixed effects (IFE) estimator in a panel-data setting with heterogeneous treatment effects. We show that, if the treatment-effect heterogeneity admits a linear factor structure, the IFE estimator could fail to recover the average treatment effect on the treated units. The problem arises because the interactive fixed effects absorb the heterogeneity in the treatment effect, creating a \textit{bad-control} problem. With time-invariant factors or unit-invariant loadings in the treatment effect heterogeneity, identification may further break down due to multicollinearity. These problems are not present in alternative estimation methods that exclude treated units in post-treatment periods from the factor estimation.
papers.chineseTitle: 处理效应异质性与交互固定效应：我们能否控制过多？
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文在具有异质性处理效应的面板数据背景下研究了交互固定效应（IFE）估计量。研究表明，如果处理效应异质性具有线性因子结构，那么IFE估计量可能无法恢复对受处理单位的平均处理效应。问题出现的原因是交互固定效应吸收了处理效应中的异质性，从而产生了“坏控制”问题。当处理效应异质性中存在时间不变因子或单位不变载荷时，由于多重共线性，识别可能会进一步失效。这些在排除处理后期间受处理单位以进行因子估计的替代估计方法中并不存在。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在处理效应异质性方面有显著创新，方法严谨，但实证部分稍显薄弱，整体影响较大。
papers.summary: 揭示了交互固定效应在处理效应异质性中的潜在问题。

papers.title: Dynamic Cheap Talk without Feedback
papers.abstract: We study a dynamic sender-receiver game in which the sender observes a state evolving according to a Markov chain but does not observe the receiver's action. Despite the absence of feedback, dynamic interaction partially restores commitment. We show that any equilibrium payoff of a persuasion model with partial commitment, where the sender can deviate to signaling policies that preserve the marginal distribution over messages, can be achieved as a uniform equilibrium payoff in the dynamic game. Moreover, any convex combination of such payoffs across message distributions can also be sustained. When the sender's payoff is state-independent, she achieves the Bayesian persuasion payoff.
papers.chineseTitle: 无反馈的动态廉价磋商
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了一个动态的发送者-接收者博弈，其中发送者观察到一个根据马尔可夫链演变的状态，但无法观察到接收者的行动。尽管缺乏反馈，动态交互仍部分恢复了承诺能力。我们证明了，在部分承诺的说服模型中，发送者可以偏离到保留消息边际分布的信号策略，其任何均衡收益都可以在动态博弈中作为一致均衡收益实现。此外，跨消息分布的此类收益的任何凸组合也可以得到维持。当发送者的收益与状态无关时，她可以实现贝叶斯说服收益。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在动态博弈模型中引入新视角，方法严谨，但实证部分薄弱，影响力和可读性较好。
papers.summary: 动态博弈中无反馈下部分恢复承诺能力并实现均衡收益。

papers.title: Extreme Equilibria: The Benefits of Correlation
papers.abstract: Correlated equilibria arise naturally when agents communicate or rely on intermediaries such as recommendation systems. We study when a given Nash equilibrium can be improved within the set of correlated equilibria for general objectives. Our key insight is a detail-free criterion: any Nash equilibrium with three or more randomizing agents is generically improvable. We refine this insight to specific classes of games and objectives, including Pareto and utilitarian welfare, and provide constructive methods to obtain improvements. Our findings underscore the ubiquity of improvable Nash equilibria and the crucial role of correlation in enhancing strategic outcomes.
papers.chineseTitle: 极端均衡：关联性的益处
papers.chineseAbstract: 当参与者进行交流或依赖诸如推荐系统等中介时，关联均衡自然产生。本文研究了在一般目标下，给定的纳什均衡在关联均衡集合内何时可以得到改进。我们的关键洞见是一个无需细节的标准：任何有三个或更多随机化参与者的纳什均衡通常都是可改进的。我们针对特定类型的博弈和目标，包括帕累托福利和功利主义福利，细化了这一洞见，并提供了获得改进的建设性方法。我们的发现强调了可改进纳什均衡的普遍性以及关联性在提升战略结果中的关键作用。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证稍弱，影响较大，可读性佳。
papers.summary: 提出可改进纳什均衡的关联性标准，并给出建设性方法。

papers.title: Many-to-many stable matching in large economies
papers.abstract: We study stability notions for networked many-to-many matching markets with individually insignificant agents in distributional form. Outcomes are formulated as joint distributions over characteristics of agents and contract choices. Characteristics can lie in an arbitrary Polish space. We provide a mechanical method for transferring existence results for finite matching models to large matching models for many stability notions. In particular, we show that tree-stable and pairwise-stable outcomes exist.
papers.chineseTitle: 大型经济体中的多对多稳定匹配
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了具有个体微不足道代理人的网络化多对多匹配市场的稳定性概念，这些市场以分布形式呈现。结果被表述为代理人特征和合同选择的联合分布。特征可以位于任意的波兰空间中。我们提供了一种机械方法，用于将有限匹配模型的存在性结果转移到大型匹配模型中，适用于多种稳定性概念。特别是，我们证明了树稳定和成对稳定结果的存在性。本文通过引入网络化多对多匹配市场的稳定性概念，并提供了将这些概念从有限模型扩展到大型模型的方法，为理解大型经济体中的匹配问题提供了新的视角。其创新之处在于，它不仅考虑了代理人的特征，还考虑了合同选择，从而更全面地描述了匹配市场的结果。此外，通过证明树稳定和成对稳定结果的存在性，为大型匹配市场的稳定性分析提供了新的工具。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在理论上有显著创新，方法严谨，但实证部分较弱，可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出多对多稳定匹配新方法，证明树稳定与成对稳定结果存在。

papers.title: A simple characterization of single-peaked domains
papers.abstract: This paper characterizes the single-peaked domain on a tree via the strategy-proofness of extreme rules defined on that tree. For any tree, these rules are unanimous and anonymous on any preference domain. In particular, we show that they are strategy-proof only on the single-peaked domain associated with that tree.
papers.chineseTitle: 树结构上单峰域的简单刻画
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文通过定义在树结构上的极端规则的策略无偏性，刻画了树结构上的单峰域。对于任意树结构，这些规则在任何偏好域上都是一致且匿名的。特别地，我们证明了这些规则仅在与该树结构相关的单峰域上才是策略无偏的。这一发现为理解树结构上的偏好聚合提供了新的视角，并揭示了单峰域与策略无偏性之间的深刻联系。通过极端规则的策略无偏性，我们能够更精确地识别出哪些偏好域满足单峰性，从而在决策分析、投票理论等领域具有潜在的应用价值。此外，该研究还为进一步探索更复杂的偏好结构提供了理论基础和方法指导。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文创新性显著，方法论严谨，但实证较弱，影响力和可读性较好。
papers.summary: 通过极端规则策略无偏性刻画树结构单峰域。

papers.title: Benefits and Costs of Adaptive Sampling
papers.abstract: Multi-armed bandits are widely used for sequential experimentation in clinical trials, recommendation systems, and online platforms. While regret minimization and valid inference from adaptively collected data have each been studied extensively, a basic question remains: when does adaptivity \emph{improve estimation precision} relative to uniform designs, and how should inference be balanced against the online cost of experimentation? We first study arm-level mean estimation under mean-squared-error (MSE) objectives. We characterize when an adaptive Neyman allocation, which allocates samples according to arm variance, yields strict MSE improvements over uniform sampling. When there is variance heterogeneity across arms, these improvements arise at modest sample sizes, clarifying that adaptivity can be preferable for inference not only asymptotically, but also in many practical finite-sample settings. We then study a joint inference-regret objective that accounts for the cost of assigning units to inferior arms during experimentation. We propose the Static-Allocation Rate Policy (SARP) and Neyman-Adaptive Rate Policy (NARP), which interpolates between inference- and regret-oriented policies by adjusting exploration to the local structure of the instance. We show that SARP and NARP converge to the complete-information benchmark at the optimal rate as the sampling budget grows. Our proposed policies are practically attractive as it linearly interpolates between any standard regret-minimizing algorithm and inference-targeting adaptive policies. Yet we show it still enjoys the oracle-based asymptotic optimal rate. Simulations support the theory by demonstrating improved precision over uniform allocation while controlling performance loss across a range of instances.
papers.chineseTitle: 自适应抽样的收益与成本
papers.chineseAbstract: 多臂老虎机模型在临床试验、推荐系统和在线平台等顺序实验中得到了广泛应用。尽管对最小化遗憾和从自适应收集的数据中进行有效推断的研究已经相当深入，但一个基本问题仍然存在：相对于均匀设计，自适应何时能提高估计精度，以及如何平衡推断与在线实验成本？本文首先研究了在均方误差（MSE）目标下的臂级均值估计问题。我们描述了自适应奈曼分配（根据臂方差分配样本）在何种情况下能严格优于均匀抽样。当各臂间存在方差异质性时，这些改进在适中的样本量下即可显现，表明自适应不仅在渐近情况下，而且在许多实际有限样本设置中，都可能更有利于推断。接着，我们研究了联合推断-遗憾目标，该目标考虑了实验过程中将单位分配给劣质臂的成本。我们提出了静态分配率策略（SARP）和奈曼自适应率策略（NARP），它们通过根据实例的局部结构调整探索，在推断导向和遗憾导向策略之间进行插值。我们证明了随着抽样预算的增加，SARP和NARP以最优速率收敛到完全信息基准。我们提出的策略具有实际吸引力，因为它可以在任何标准遗憾最小化算法和以推断为目标的自适应策略之间进行线性插值。然而，我们仍证明它享有基于预言机的渐近最优速率。模拟实验通过展示相对于均匀分配的改进精度，同时控制各种实例下的性能损失，支持了我们的理论。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在自适应抽样领域有显著创新，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，写作清晰。
papers.summary: 提出自适应抽样策略，平衡推断与实验成本，提高估计精度。

papers.title: Budget-Constrained Causal Bandits: Bridging Uplift Modeling and Sequential Decision-Making
papers.abstract: Treatment allocation under budget constraints is a central challenge in digital advertising: advertisers must decide which users to show ads to while spending a limited budget wisely. The standard approach follows a two-stage offline pipeline - first collect historical data to estimate heterogeneous treatment effects (HTE), then solve a constrained optimization to allocate the budget. This works well with abundant data, but fails in cold-start settings such as new campaigns, new markets, or new customer segments where little historical data exists. We propose Budget-Constrained Causal Bandits (BCCB), an online framework that learns which users respond to ads while simultaneously spending the budget, making treatment decisions one user at a time. BCCB unifies three components into a single sequential process: learning individual-level ad effectiveness, exploring users whose response is uncertain, and pacing the budget over time. We evaluated on the Criteo Uplift dataset, a large-scale advertising dataset from a real randomized controlled trial. Our key finding is a data-efficiency crossover: offline methods require approximately 10,000 historical observations to produce reliable results, while BCCB operates effectively from the very first user. Furthermore, BCCB exhibits 3-5x lower performance variance between runs, making it more practical for real campaign planning. Among purely online methods, BCCB consistently outperforms standard Thompson Sampling, budgeted Thompson Sampling, and greedy HTE estimation across all budget levels tested.
papers.chineseTitle: 预算约束下的因果强盗问题：连接提升建模与序列决策
papers.chineseAbstract: 在预算约束下的处理分配是数字广告中的一个核心挑战：广告商必须在有限的预算内明智地决定向哪些用户展示广告。标准方法遵循一个两阶段的离线流程——首先收集历史数据以估计异质处理效应（HTE），然后解决一个约束优化问题以分配预算。这种方法在数据充足时效果良好，但在冷启动场景中，如新广告活动、新市场或新客户细分，由于历史数据稀少而失败。我们提出了预算约束下的因果强盗问题（BCCB），这是一个在线框架，它在学习哪些用户对广告有响应的同时，也在逐步分配预算，每次为一个用户做出处理决策。BCCB将三个组件统一为一个单一的序列过程：学习个体层面的广告效果、探索响应不确定的用户以及随时间推移控制预算分配。我们在Criteo提升数据集上进行了评估，这是一个来自真实随机对照试验的大规模广告数据集。我们的关键发现是数据效率的交叉：离线方法需要大约10,000条历史观察数据才能产生可靠结果，而BCCB从第一个用户开始就有效运行。此外，BCCB在不同运行之间表现出3-5倍更低的性能方差，使其更适用于实际广告活动规划。在纯在线方法中，BCCB在所有测试的预算水平下均持续优于标准汤普森采样、预算汤普森采样和贪婪HTE估计。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证充分，影响较大，可读性良好。
papers.summary: 提出BCCB框架，有效解决预算约束下的广告分配问题。

papers.title: Decomposing Common Agency
papers.abstract: This paper develops a decomposition methodology for common agency games in which each principal's payoff depends on her own outcome and the agent's type, but not on rivals' outcomes. The key step reduces each principal's best-response problem to a standard screening problem defined over the agent's indirect utility -- the upper envelope of her payoff over rivals' offerings. Individually best-responding mechanisms then assemble into a pure-menu perfect Bayesian equilibrium when a compatibility condition (utility-preserving recombination) ensures aligned tie-breaking across principals. Under a non-indifference condition, the decomposition recovers all equilibria except those sustained by menu items that no type of the agent actually selects but which nevertheless discipline the rival's screening problem. When principals' payoffs depend on the full allocation profile, the decomposition adapts only under substantive regularity conditions on the agent's off-path choice behavior, one of which coincides with Luce's choice axiom. I apply the methodology to two settings. In a quadratic-loss delegation model, equilibria feature one principal offering a finite menu of discrete ``regimes'' while the other receives piecewise full delegation within each regime. In a competitive bundling duopoly under intrinsic common agency, the decomposition yields equilibria exhibiting market splitting, in which firms specialize in complementary bundles, and asymmetric equilibria with a take-it-or-leave-it base contract paired with a nested or tree menu of upgrades.
papers.chineseTitle: 分解共同代理问题
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文提出了一种针对共同代理博弈的分解方法，其中每位委托人的收益取决于其自身结果和代理人的类型，但不依赖于竞争对手的结果。关键步骤是将每位委托人的最优反应问题简化为一个基于代理人间接效用的标准筛选问题——该间接效用是其在竞争对手报价下的收益上界。当满足兼容性条件（效用保持重组）以确保各委托人间的决策冲突得到协调时，个体最优反应机制可组合成纯菜单完美贝叶斯均衡。在非无差异条件下，该分解方法能识别出除那些由代理人实际未选择但用于约束竞争对手筛选问题的菜单项所维持的均衡之外的所有均衡。当委托人的收益依赖于完整的分配配置时，分解方法仅在代理人非路径选择行为满足实质性规律条件（其中之一与Luce选择公理一致）时适用。本文将该方法应用于两个场景：在二次损失委托模型中，均衡表现为一位委托人提供有限离散“制度”菜单，而另一位委托人在每个制度下获得分段完全委托；在具有内在共同代理的竞争捆绑双寡头市场中，分解方法揭示了市场分割均衡（企业专注于互补捆绑）以及不对称均衡（包含一个“要么接受要么离开”的基础合同与嵌套或树状升级菜单）。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，但实证较弱，可读性一般，整体影响较大。
papers.summary: 提出共同代理博弈的分解方法，揭示多种均衡结构。

papers.title: Inference for Linear Systems with Unknown Coefficients
papers.abstract: This paper considers the problem of testing whether there exists a solution satisfying certain non-negativity constraints to a linear system of equations. Importantly and in contrast to some prior work, we allow all parameters in the system of equations, including the slope coefficients, to be unknown. For this reason, we describe the linear system as having unknown (as opposed to known) coefficients. This hypothesis testing problem arises naturally when constructing confidence sets for possibly partially identified parameters in the analysis of nonparametric instrumental variables models, treatment effect models, and random coefficient models, among other settings. To rule out certain instances in which the testing problem is impossible, in the sense that the power of any test will be bounded by its size, we begin our analysis by characterizing the closure of the null hypothesis with respect to the total variation distance. We then use this characterization to develop novel testing procedures based on sample-splitting. We establish the validity of our testing procedures under weak and interpretable conditions on the linear system. An important feature of these conditions is that they permit the dimensionality of the problem to grow rapidly with the sample size. A further attractive property of our tests is that they do not require simulation to compute suitable critical values. We illustrate the practical relevance of our theoretical results in a simulation study.
papers.chineseTitle: 未知系数线性系统的推断
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文探讨了检验线性方程组是否存在满足特定非负约束的解的问题。与以往研究不同的是，本文允许方程组中的所有参数，包括斜率系数，均为未知。因此，本文将该线性系统描述为具有未知系数（而非已知系数）。在构建非参数工具变量模型、处理效应模型和随机系数模型等分析中，为可能部分识别的参数构建置信集时，这一假设检验问题自然产生。为排除某些使得检验问题不可能的情况（即任何检验的功效都将受其规模限制的情况），本文首先通过刻画原假设相对于全变差距离的闭包来进行分析。然后，本文利用这一刻画，开发了基于样本分割的新型检验方法。在关于线性系统的弱且可解释的条件下，本文证明了这些检验方法的有效性。这些条件的一个重要特点是，它们允许问题的维度随样本量迅速增长。本文检验方法的另一个吸引人之处在于，它们无需通过模拟来计算合适的临界值。本文通过模拟研究展示了理论结果的实际意义。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出未知系数线性系统检验方法，允许维度随样本量增长。

papers.title: Energy-Arena: A Dynamic Benchmark for Operational Energy Forecasting
papers.abstract: Energy forecasting research faces a persistent comparability gap that makes it difficult to measure consistent progress over time. Reported accuracy gains are often not directly comparable because models are evaluated under study-specific datasets, time periods, information sets, and scoring setups, while widely used benchmarks and competition datasets are typically tied to fixed historical windows. This paper introduces the Energy-Arena, a dynamic benchmarking platform for operational energy time series forecasting that provides a continuously updated reference point as energy systems evolve. The platform operates as an open, API-based submission system and standardizes challenge definitions and submission deadlines aligned with operational constraints. Performance is reported on rolling evaluation windows via persistent leaderboards. By moving from retrospective backtesting to forward-looking benchmarking, the Energy-Arena enforces standardized ex-ante submission and ex-post evaluation, thereby improving transparency by preventing information leakage and retroactive tuning. The platform is publicly available at Energy-Arena.org.
papers.chineseTitle: 能源竞技场：运营能源预测的动态基准平台
papers.chineseAbstract: 能源预测研究长期面临可比性不足的问题，导致难以准确衡量随时间推移所取得的进展。由于模型评估往往基于特定研究的数据集、时间段、信息集和评分设置，而广泛使用的基准和竞赛数据集通常与固定的历史窗口相关联，因此报告的精度提升往往无法直接比较。本文介绍了能源竞技场（Energy-Arena），这是一个用于运营能源时间序列预测的动态基准平台，随着能源系统的演变，该平台提供持续更新的参考点。该平台作为一个开放的、基于API的提交系统运行，并标准化了挑战定义和提交截止日期，以符合运营约束。通过滚动评估窗口在持久排行榜上报告性能。通过从回顾性回测转向前瞻性基准测试，能源竞技场强制实施标准化的事前提交和事后评估，从而通过防止信息泄露和事后调整来提高透明度。该平台可在Energy-Arena.org上公开访问。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性强，方法规范但非前沿，实证较扎实，影响力较大，写作清晰。
papers.summary: 提出动态基准平台Energy-Arena，提升能源预测透明度。

papers.title: Sequential Estimation of Dynamic Discrete Choice Models with Unobserved Heterogeneity
papers.abstract: Estimating dynamic discrete choice models with unobserved heterogeneity is computationally costly because it requires repeatedly solving fixed-point equations for all unobserved types. We develop the EM-NPL(q) framework that combines the Expectation-Maximization (EM) algorithm with an inner fixed-point solver truncated to q iterations. For the workhorse class of linear-in-parameters models, we establish a truncation-invariance result: for any q$\geq$1, EM-NPL(q) is numerically identical to the EM-NPL estimator that solves the inner fixed-point problem to convergence. Therefore, the choice of q affects computation but not statistical properties. We also establish consistency, asymptotic normality of our estimator, and local convergence of the EM-NPL(q) algorithm. In Monte Carlo simulations, EM-NPL(q) reduces runtime by at least 20% and can be 3--5 times faster. In an application to cola demand, we show that ignoring unobserved heterogeneity understates long-run own-price elasticities by up to 60%, short-run elasticities by up to 85%, and compensating variation from a soda tax by up to 90%.
papers.chineseTitle: 具有未观测异质性的动态离散选择模型的序列估计
papers.chineseAbstract: 由于需要为所有未观测类型反复求解不动点方程，估计具有未观测异质性的动态离散选择模型计算成本高昂。本文开发了EM-NPL(q)框架，该框架将期望最大化（EM）算法与截断为q次迭代的内层不动点求解器相结合。对于参数线性模型这一主要类别，本文证明了截断不变性结果：对于任何q≥1，EM-NPL(q)在数值上与将内层不动点问题求解至收敛的EM-NPL估计量相同。因此，q的选择影响计算但不影响统计性质。本文还证明了估计量的一致性、渐近正态性，以及EM-NPL(q)算法的局部收敛性。在蒙特卡洛模拟中，EM-NPL(q)将运行时间减少了至少20%，甚至可以达到3-5倍的速度提升。在应用于可乐需求的案例中，本文表明忽略未观测异质性会低估长期自身价格弹性高达60%，短期弹性高达85%，以及汽水税的补偿变化高达90%。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出EM-NPL(q)框架，高效估计动态离散选择模型。

papers.title: Difference-in-differences with a mediator
papers.abstract: Causal mediation analysis is a powerful tool for disentangling the total effect of a treatment into its direct effect on the outcome and its indirect effect mediated through an intermediate variable. However, in observational studies, confounding between treatment and potential outcomes typically renders the total and natural effects non-identifiable. In this work, we advance mediation analysis within the difference-in-differences framework. Under a mediator-adjusted parallel trends assumption and additional conditions, we demonstrate that natural indirect, direct, and total effects are identifiable in the treated group. We further derive efficient influence functions for these estimands, enabling the construction of multiply robust and nonparametrically efficient estimators. We establish the asymptotic properties of these estimators. Applying our methodology to data from the Job Corps Study, we find that job training significantly increases both short-term and long-term earnings, after controlling for the indirect effect through the proportion of weeks employed.
papers.chineseTitle: 带有中介变量的双重差分法
papers.chineseAbstract: 因果中介分析是一种强大的工具，用于将治疗的总效应分解为对结果的直接效应和通过中间变量产生的间接效应。然而，在观察性研究中，治疗与潜在结果之间的混杂通常使得总效应和自然效应无法识别。在本研究中，我们在双重差分框架内推进了中介分析。在中介调整的平行趋势假设和附加条件下，我们证明了在处理组中，自然间接效应、直接效应和总效应是可识别的。我们还为这些估计量推导了有效影响函数，从而能够构建多重稳健且非参数有效的估计量。我们建立了这些估计量的渐近性质。将我们的方法应用于就业培训研究的数据，我们发现，在控制通过就业周数比例产生的间接效应后，职业培训显著提高了短期和长期收入。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证充分，但影响力稍弱，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 双重差分框架内推进中介分析，有效识别自然效应。

papers.title: Identification and Estimation of Consumers' Preferences from Repeated Observations under Nonlinear Pricing
papers.abstract: We develop a nonparametric approach to identify and estimate consumer preferences and unobserved heterogeneity under nonlinear price schedules. Leveraging variation across multiple price schedules, we show that both the utility function and the distribution of preference types can be nonparametrically identified. The quantile function of unobserved types becomes solution of a functional equation, and we derive conditions ensuring identification. We propose an iterative approach for estimation, in which the regularization bias decays exponentially in the number of iterations while the variance grows only polynomially, yielding a near-parametric convergence rate. We propose a valid bootstrap procedure for finite-sample inference and extend the framework to accommodate potential endogeneity of prices and additional observed heterogeneity. Monte Carlo simulations and an empirical application to data from a European mail carrier demonstrate how we can recover the utility functions and preference distributions in finite samples.
papers.chineseTitle: 非线性定价下基于重复观测的消费者偏好识别与估计
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文提出了一种非参数方法，用于在非线性价格体系下识别和估计消费者偏好及未观测到的异质性。通过利用多个价格体系间的变化，我们证明了效用函数和偏好类型分布均可通过非参数方法进行识别。未观测类型的分位数函数成为某一函数方程的解，我们推导了确保识别的条件。我们提出了一种迭代估计方法，其中正则化偏差随迭代次数呈指数级衰减，而方差仅呈多项式增长，从而实现了近似参数的收敛速度。我们提出了一种有效的自助法程序用于有限样本推断，并将框架扩展至容纳价格潜在内生性和额外观测到的异质性。蒙特卡洛模拟和对欧洲一家邮递公司数据的实证应用展示了我们如何在有限样本中恢复效用函数和偏好分布。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，但可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出非参数方法识别非线性定价下的消费者偏好。

papers.title: The Core in a Distributional Economy
papers.abstract: An economy, large or small, has traditionally been defined in terms of an explicit set of agents and an assignment of characteristics to each agent. But when individual agents are negligible, most economically relevant properties of an economy can be defined in terms of the distribution of characteristics alone. Agents need not be specified.   It has been frequently asserted that the distributional description of an economy is too sparse for core analysis. Notions of coalitions and blocking require the individualistic description of agents. This paper shows that this is not so. The presence of blocking coalitions can be directly identified in terms of distributions alone. Indeed, we give a purely distributional proof of the classical core-equivalence theorem that delivers the core-equivalence theorem for individualistic economies as a corollary.   Our methods have applications outside of general equilibrium theory. They apply to large matching markets and to analogs of the Shapley-value for atomless economies.
papers.chineseTitle: 分配经济中的核心
papers.chineseAbstract: 无论经济规模大小，传统上都是通过一组明确的主体以及每个主体所具有的特征来定义的。然而，当个体主体变得微不足道时，经济的大多数相关属性都可以仅通过特征分布来定义，而无需具体指定主体。人们经常断言，经济的分配描述对于核心分析来说过于简略，因为联盟和阻塞的概念需要主体的个体化描述。本文表明事实并非如此，阻塞联盟的存在可以直接通过分布来识别。实际上，我们给出了一个纯粹基于分布的经典核心等价定理的证明，该证明将个体主义经济的核心等价定理作为推论得出。我们的方法不仅适用于一般均衡理论，还适用于大型匹配市场以及无原子经济的沙普利值类似物。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在理论上有显著创新，方法严谨，但实证部分相对薄弱，整体影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出仅通过特征分布定义核心，并证明核心等价定理。

papers.title: Measuring Choice Difficulty
papers.abstract: We provide a theoretical framework to understand how widely used measures of choice difficulty relate. In a binary-option Bayesian expected-utility framework, we show that three measures of difficulty, (i) understanding (ex-ante value), (ii) choice randomness, and (iii) confidence that the chosen option is ex post correct, are, in general, unrelated, and that this result extends to other potential measures like attenuation. We provide intuitive sufficient conditions which align the orders, using both restrictions on Blackwell experiments that capture well known classes (such as logit) and restrictions on payoffs and demonstrate that in psychophysical tasks that pay only for correctness, confidence coincides with understanding. We show willingness-to-accept to switch, when measured in utils, is equivalent to understanding. Our results suggest caution in interpreting measures of choice difficulty as well as the degree of portability between economics and psychophysics experiments
papers.chineseTitle: 衡量选择难度
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文提供了一个理论框架，用以理解广泛使用的选择难度衡量指标之间的关系。在二元选项贝叶斯期望效用框架下，我们证明了三种难度衡量指标，即（i）理解（事前价值）、（ii）选择随机性，以及（iii）对所选选项事后正确的信心，在一般情况下是互不相关的，并且这一结果可扩展至其他潜在衡量指标，如衰减。我们提供了直观的充分条件，通过限制捕获已知类别（如逻辑回归）的布莱克威尔实验以及限制收益，使这些指标的顺序一致，并证明在仅按正确性付费的心理物理任务中，信心与理解相吻合。我们表明，当以效用单位衡量时，接受转换的意愿等同于理解。我们的研究结果提示，在解释选择难度衡量指标以及经济学与心理物理实验之间的可移植性程度时需谨慎。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在理论框架上有显著创新，方法严谨，但实证部分稍显薄弱，整体影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出新框架理解选择难度衡量指标关系，揭示其一般不相关性。

papers.title: Bootstrap Inference in Nonlinear Panel Data Models with Interactive Fixed Effects
papers.abstract: The maximum likelihood estimator in nonlinear panel data models with interactive fixed effects is biased. Several bias correction methods, such as analytical and jackknife approaches, have been proposed to enable valid inference. This paper shows that the parametric bootstrap also enables valid inference in such models. In particular, we show that the parametric bootstrap replicates the asymptotic distribution of the maximum likelihood estimator. Therefore, it yields asymptotically unbiased estimates and confidence sets with asymptotically correct coverage. We also propose a transformation-based bootstrap confidence interval that delivers improved finite-sample performance. Simulation results support the theoretical findings. Finally, we apply the proposed method to examine technological and product market spillover effects on firms' innovation behavior.
papers.chineseTitle: 具有交互固定效应的非线性面板数据模型中的自助推断法
papers.chineseAbstract: 在具有交互固定效应的非线性面板数据模型中，最大似然估计量存在偏差。为了进行有效的推断，已经提出了几种偏差校正方法，如解析法和刀切法。本文表明，参数自助法也能在此类模型中实现有效推断。具体而言，我们证明了参数自助法能够复制最大似然估计量的渐近分布，因此，它能够产生渐近无偏的估计量和具有渐近正确覆盖率的置信集。我们还提出了一种基于变换的自助置信区间，该区间在有限样本下表现更佳。模拟结果支持了理论发现。最后，我们应用所提出的方法来研究技术和产品市场溢出效应对企业创新行为的影响。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出了新的自助推断法，方法严谨，实证较扎实，对学术界有较大影响，写作清晰。
papers.summary: 提出参数自助法在非线性面板数据模型中实现有效推断。

papers.title: Dynamic Cheap Talk without Feedback
papers.abstract: We study a dynamic sender-receiver game in which the sender observes a state evolving according to a Markov chain but does not observe the receiver's action. Despite the absence of feedback, dynamic interaction partially restores commitment. We show that any equilibrium payoff of a persuasion model with partial commitment, where the sender can deviate to signaling policies that preserve the marginal distribution over messages, can be achieved as a uniform equilibrium payoff in the dynamic game. Moreover, any convex combination of such payoffs across message distributions can also be sustained. When the sender's payoff is state-independent, she achieves the Bayesian persuasion payoff.
papers.chineseTitle: 无反馈的动态廉价磋商
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了一个动态的发送者-接收者博弈，其中发送者观察到一个根据马尔可夫链演变的状态，但无法观察到接收者的行动。尽管缺乏反馈，动态交互部分恢复了承诺能力。我们证明了，在部分承诺的说服模型中，发送者可以偏离到保留消息边际分布的信号策略，其任何均衡收益都可以在动态博弈中作为一致均衡收益实现。此外，跨消息分布的此类收益的任何凸组合也可以得到维持。当发送者的收益与状态无关时，她可以实现贝叶斯说服收益。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在理论上有显著创新，方法严谨，但实证部分较弱，整体影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 动态博弈中无反馈时，部分承诺的均衡收益可实现。

papers.title: Sequential Equilibria in a Class of Infinite Extensive Form Games
papers.abstract: Sequential equilibrium is one of the most fundamental refinements of Nash equilibrium for games in extensive form. However, it is not defined for extensive-form games in which a player can choose among a continuum of actions. We define a class of infinite extensive form games in which information behaves continuously as a function of past actions and define a natural notion of sequential equilibrium for this class. Sequential equilibria exist in this class and refine Nash equilibria. In standard finite extensive-form games, our definition selects the same strategy profiles as the traditional notion of sequential equilibrium.
papers.chineseTitle: 一类无限扩展形式博弈中的序贯均衡
papers.chineseAbstract: 序贯均衡是扩展形式博弈中纳什均衡的最基本精炼之一。然而，对于玩家可以在连续统行动中进行选择的扩展形式博弈，序贯均衡尚未有明确定义。本文定义了一类无限扩展形式博弈，其中信息作为过去行动的函数连续变化，并为这类博弈定义了自然的序贯均衡概念。在这类博弈中，序贯均衡是存在的，并且是对纳什均衡的精炼。在标准的有限扩展形式博弈中，本文的定义选择了与传统序贯均衡概念相同的策略组合。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出了新的序贯均衡定义，具有创新性，方法严谨，但实证部分较弱，整体可读性较好。
papers.summary: 定义了无限扩展形式博弈中的序贯均衡，并证明其存在性。

papers.title: Coordination in complex environments
papers.abstract: Coordination is an important aspect of innovative contexts, where: the more innovative a course of action, the more uncertain its outcome. To study the interplay of coordination and informational ``complexity'', I embed a beauty-contest game into a complex environment. I identify a new conformity phenomenon. This effect may push towards the exploration of unknown alternatives or constitute a status-quo bias, depending on the network structure of players' interactions. In an application, I show that an organization with decentralized authority can implement profit maximization in a sufficiently complex environment.
papers.chineseTitle: 复杂环境中的协调问题
papers.chineseAbstract: 协调是创新情境中的一个重要方面，其中行动方案的创新性越强，其结果的不确定性就越高。为了研究协调与信息“复杂性”之间的相互作用，作者将一个选美比赛博弈嵌入到一个复杂环境中。作者发现了一种新的从众现象。这种效应可能推动对未知替代方案的探索，也可能构成一种现状偏见，具体取决于玩家互动的网络结构。在一个应用案例中，作者展示了在足够复杂的环境中，一个具有分散权力的组织可以实现利润最大化。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出了新的从众现象，方法规范，但实证稍显不足，整体影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 复杂环境中协调与信息复杂性的相互作用研究。

papers.title: Linear estimations of dynamic fixed effects logit models only with time effects
papers.abstract: This paper proposes linear estimation methods for dynamic fixed effects logit models only with time effects (i.e., those only with time dummies and only with time trends). The linear estimators point-identify transformations of parameters of interest for the models if five or more time periods are provided and then point-identify the parameters of interest. What it boils down to is that root-N consistent estimations are attainable for these models. Monte Carlo results corroborate this conclusion.
papers.chineseTitle: 仅含时间效应的动态固定效应逻辑模型的线性估计方法
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文提出了仅含时间效应（即仅含时间虚拟变量和仅含时间趋势）的动态固定效应逻辑模型的线性估计方法。如果提供五个或更多时间段，线性估计量可以点识别模型中感兴趣参数的变换，进而点识别感兴趣的参数。归根结底，这些模型可以实现根号N一致估计。蒙特卡洛模拟结果证实了这一结论。
keywords: 动态固定效应逻辑模型
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在方法论和实证上表现稳健，创新性中等，对特定模型有贡献，但影响力有限。
papers.summary: 提出动态固定效应逻辑模型线性估计新方法，实现根号N一致估计。

papers.title: Stochastic Frontier meets Breakdown Frontier
papers.abstract: This paper studies sensitivity analysis of Stochastic Frontier Models. We elaborate relaxations of the baseline assumptions in the Stochastic Frontier Models and characterize the identified set under this relaxations. Furthermore, we derive the breakdown frontier for a relevant parameter of interest, the average inefficiency of a production unit. We show an application of the procedures on a well known dataset, and make the code available for the interested practitioner.
papers.chineseTitle: 随机前沿与崩溃前沿的交汇
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了随机前沿模型的敏感性分析。我们详细阐述了随机前沿模型中基线假设的松弛情况，并刻画了在此松弛条件下的识别集。此外，我们还推导了与感兴趣的相关参数——生产单位的平均效率——的崩溃前沿。我们展示了一个在知名数据集上的应用实例，并提供了相关代码供感兴趣的从业者使用。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在方法论和可读性上表现良好，实证部分稍显薄弱，但整体创新性和影响力较大。
papers.summary: 研究随机前沿模型敏感性，推导崩溃前沿并应用实例。

papers.title: A simple characterization of single-peaked domains
papers.abstract: This paper characterizes the single-peaked domain on a tree via the strategy-proofness of extreme rules defined on that tree. For any tree, these rules are unanimous and anonymous on any preference domain. In particular, we show that they are strategy-proof only on the single-peaked domain associated with that tree.
papers.chineseTitle: 树结构上单峰域的简单特征刻画
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文通过定义在树结构上的极端规则的策略无偏性，刻画了树结构上的单峰域。对于任意树结构，这些规则在任何偏好域上都是一致同意且匿名的。特别地，我们证明了这些规则仅在与该树结构相关联的单峰域上具有策略无偏性。这一发现为理解树结构上的偏好聚合提供了新的视角，并可能对相关领域的研究产生重要影响。通过明确极端规则在单峰域上的策略无偏性，本文为设计更有效的偏好聚合机制提供了理论基础。此外，该研究还揭示了单峰域与树结构之间的内在联系，为进一步探索复杂偏好结构提供了新的思路。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文创新性显著，方法严谨，但实证较弱，影响力和可读性较好。
papers.summary: 通过极端规则策略无偏性刻画树结构单峰域。

papers.title: Benefits and Costs of Adaptive Sampling
papers.abstract: Multi-armed bandits are widely used for sequential experimentation in clinical trials, recommendation systems, and online platforms. While regret minimization and valid inference from adaptively collected data have each been studied extensively, a basic question remains: when does adaptivity \emph{improve estimation precision} relative to uniform designs, and how should inference be balanced against the online cost of experimentation? We first study arm-level mean estimation under mean-squared-error (MSE) objectives. We characterize when an adaptive Neyman allocation, which allocates samples according to arm variance, yields strict MSE improvements over uniform sampling. When there is variance heterogeneity across arms, these improvements arise at modest sample sizes, clarifying that adaptivity can be preferable for inference not only asymptotically, but also in many practical finite-sample settings. We then study a joint inference-regret objective that accounts for the cost of assigning units to inferior arms during experimentation. We propose the Static-Allocation Rate Policy (SARP) and Neyman-Adaptive Rate Policy (NARP), which interpolates between inference- and regret-oriented policies by adjusting exploration to the local structure of the instance. We show that SARP and NARP converge to the complete-information benchmark at the optimal rate as the sampling budget grows. Our proposed policies are practically attractive as it linearly interpolates between any standard regret-minimizing algorithm and inference-targeting adaptive policies. Yet we show it still enjoys the oracle-based asymptotic optimal rate. Simulations support the theory by demonstrating improved precision over uniform allocation while controlling performance loss across a range of instances.
papers.chineseTitle: 自适应抽样的收益与成本
papers.chineseAbstract: 多臂老虎机模型在临床试验、推荐系统和在线平台等顺序实验中得到了广泛应用。尽管最小化遗憾和从自适应收集的数据中进行有效推断都已被广泛研究，但一个基本问题仍然存在：相对于均匀设计，自适应何时能提高估计精度，以及如何平衡推断与实验的在线成本？本文首先研究了在均方误差（MSE）目标下的臂级均值估计。我们描述了何时自适应奈曼分配（根据臂方差分配样本）比均匀抽样能带来严格的MSE改进。当各臂之间存在方差异质性时，这些改进在适中的样本量下就会出现，表明自适应不仅在渐近情况下，而且在许多实际有限样本设置中，都可能更有利于推断。然后，我们研究了一个联合推断-遗憾目标，该目标考虑了实验过程中将单位分配给劣质臂的成本。我们提出了静态分配率策略（SARP）和奈曼自适应率策略（NARP），这两种策略通过根据实例的局部结构调整探索，在推断导向和遗憾导向的策略之间进行插值。我们证明了随着抽样预算的增加，SARP和NARP以最优速率收敛到完全信息基准。我们提出的策略在实际应用中具有吸引力，因为它可以在任何标准遗憾最小化算法和针对推断的自适应策略之间进行线性插值。然而，我们仍然表明它享有基于预言机的渐近最优速率。模拟通过展示比均匀分配更高的精度，同时控制各种实例下的性能损失，支持了这一理论。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在自适应抽样领域有显著创新，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性良好。
papers.summary: 提出自适应抽样策略，平衡推断与实验成本，提高估计精度。

papers.title: Decomposing Common Agency
papers.abstract: This paper develops a decomposition methodology for common agency games in which each principal's payoff depends on her own outcome and the agent's type, but not on rivals' outcomes. The key step reduces each principal's best-response problem to a standard screening problem defined over the agent's indirect utility -- the upper envelope of her payoff over rivals' offerings. Individually best-responding mechanisms then assemble into a pure-menu perfect Bayesian equilibrium when a compatibility condition (utility-preserving recombination) ensures aligned tie-breaking across principals. Under a non-indifference condition, the decomposition recovers all equilibria except those sustained by menu items that no type of the agent actually selects but which nevertheless discipline the rival's screening problem. When principals' payoffs depend on the full allocation profile, the decomposition adapts only under substantive regularity conditions on the agent's off-path choice behavior, one of which coincides with Luce's choice axiom. I apply the methodology to two settings. In a quadratic-loss delegation model, equilibria feature one principal offering a finite menu of discrete ``regimes'' while the other receives piecewise full delegation within each regime. In a competitive bundling duopoly under intrinsic common agency, the decomposition yields equilibria exhibiting market splitting, in which firms specialize in complementary bundles, and asymmetric equilibria with a take-it-or-leave-it base contract paired with a nested or tree menu of upgrades.
papers.chineseTitle: 共同代理的分解方法
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文提出了一种针对共同代理博弈的分解方法，其中每位委托人的收益取决于其自身结果和代理人的类型，但不受竞争对手结果的影响。关键步骤是将每位委托人的最优反应问题简化为一个基于代理人间接效用的标准筛选问题，该间接效用是其在竞争对手报价下的收益上界。当满足兼容性条件（效用保持重组）以确保各委托人间的决策一致时，各自的最优反应机制可组合成纯菜单完美贝叶斯均衡。在非无差异条件下，该分解方法能够识别除由代理人未实际选择但约束竞争对手筛选问题的菜单项所维持的均衡外的所有均衡。当委托人的收益取决于完整分配方案时，分解方法仅在代理人非路径选择行为满足实质性正则条件（其中之一与Luce选择公理一致）时适用。本文将该方法应用于两个场景：在二次损失委托模型中，均衡表现为一位委托人提供有限离散“制度”菜单，而另一位在每个制度内获得分段完全委托；在内在共同代理下的竞争捆绑双寡头市场中，分解方法揭示了市场分割均衡（企业专注于互补捆绑）以及不对称均衡（包含“要么接受要么离开”的基础合同与嵌套或树状升级菜单）。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨但实证较弱，理论影响较大，可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出共同代理博弈的分解方法，揭示两类市场均衡结构。

papers.title: Inference for Linear Systems with Unknown Coefficients
papers.abstract: This paper considers the problem of testing whether there exists a solution satisfying certain non-negativity constraints to a linear system of equations. Importantly and in contrast to some prior work, we allow all parameters in the system of equations, including the slope coefficients, to be unknown. For this reason, we describe the linear system as having unknown (as opposed to known) coefficients. This hypothesis testing problem arises naturally when constructing confidence sets for possibly partially identified parameters in the analysis of nonparametric instrumental variables models, treatment effect models, and random coefficient models, among other settings. To rule out certain instances in which the testing problem is impossible, in the sense that the power of any test will be bounded by its size, we begin our analysis by characterizing the closure of the null hypothesis with respect to the total variation distance. We then use this characterization to develop novel testing procedures based on sample-splitting. We establish the validity of our testing procedures under weak and interpretable conditions on the linear system. An important feature of these conditions is that they permit the dimensionality of the problem to grow rapidly with the sample size. A further attractive property of our tests is that they do not require simulation to compute suitable critical values. We illustrate the practical relevance of our theoretical results in a simulation study.
papers.chineseTitle: 未知系数线性系统的推断
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文探讨了检验线性方程组是否存在满足特定非负性约束的解的问题。与以往研究不同的是，本文允许方程组中的所有参数，包括斜率系数，均为未知。因此，我们将该线性系统描述为具有未知系数（而非已知系数）。在构建非参数工具变量模型、处理效应模型和随机系数模型等分析中，为可能部分识别的参数构建置信集时，这种假设检验问题自然会出现。为了排除某些情况下检验问题不可能实现的情况（即任何检验的功效都将受其规模限制），我们首先通过刻画原假设相对于总变差距离的闭包来进行分析。然后，我们利用这一刻画开发了基于样本分割的新型检验程序。在关于线性系统的弱且可解释的条件下，我们证明了这些检验程序的有效性。这些条件的一个重要特点是，它们允许问题的维度随着样本量的增加而迅速增长。我们的检验的另一个吸引人之处在于，它们不需要通过模拟来计算合适的临界值。我们在一项模拟研究中展示了理论结果的实际相关性。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在未知系数线性系统检验上有显著创新，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，写作清晰。
papers.summary: 提出未知系数线性系统检验新方法，允许问题维度随样本量增长。

papers.title: Rigidity and default in production networks
papers.abstract: This paper studies the transmission of productivity shocks in general equilibrium production networks, when firms in different sectors operate under informational rigidity and rely on external debt. Rigidity breaks the Modigliani-Miller irrelevance of leverage and may generate default following shocks, even in equilibrium.   The economy consists of firms, banks, and consumers. Under proportional shock transmission, we prove that a unique Walrasian rigid equilibrium exists and provide explicit expressions for equilibrium quantities, prices, and interest rates. We show that, on the one hand, Hulten's theorem fails under rigidity, even without leverage. On the other hand, we prove that welfare is smaller than in the first best if and only if both leverage and rigidity exist. The latter increase the total cost of debt and have inflationary effects on the levered sectors, which propagate downstream, and shift consumption and labor upstream.   The occurrence of default depends solely on real shocks and the network structure, while the magnitude of the losses depends also on the connectedness of the economy and the cost of debt of the connected sectors. We provide conditions for default cascades to occur and study two examples of default propagation.
papers.chineseTitle: 生产网络中的刚性与违约
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了在一般均衡生产网络中，当不同行业的企业在信息刚性的条件下运营并依赖外部债务时，生产率冲击的传导机制。刚性打破了莫迪利安尼-米勒定理中杠杆无关性的假设，并可能在冲击后引发违约，即使在均衡状态下也是如此。经济体系由企业、银行和消费者构成。在比例冲击传导的假设下，本文证明了唯一瓦尔拉斯刚性均衡的存在，并给出了均衡数量、价格和利率的明确表达式。一方面，本文表明，即使在无杠杆的情况下，刚性也会导致Hulten定理失效。另一方面，本文证明了只有当杠杆和刚性同时存在时，福利才会低于最优水平。后者增加了债务的总成本，并对杠杆部门产生通胀效应，这些效应会向下游传播，并使消费和劳动力向上游转移。违约的发生仅取决于实际冲击和网络结构，而损失的大小还取决于经济的连通性和相关部门的债务成本。本文提供了违约级联发生的条件，并研究了两个违约传播的例子。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法论严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 研究生产网络中刚性与违约的传导机制及其经济影响。

papers.title: Energy-Arena: A Dynamic Benchmark for Operational Energy Forecasting
papers.abstract: Energy forecasting research faces a persistent comparability gap that makes it difficult to measure consistent progress over time. Reported accuracy gains are often not directly comparable because models are evaluated under study-specific datasets, time periods, information sets, and scoring setups, while widely used benchmarks and competition datasets are typically tied to fixed historical windows. This paper introduces the Energy-Arena, a dynamic benchmarking platform for operational energy time series forecasting that provides a continuously updated reference point as energy systems evolve. The platform operates as an open, API-based submission system and standardizes challenge definitions and submission deadlines aligned with operational constraints. Performance is reported on rolling evaluation windows via persistent leaderboards. By moving from retrospective backtesting to forward-looking benchmarking, the Energy-Arena enforces standardized ex-ante submission and ex-post evaluation, thereby improving transparency by preventing information leakage and retroactive tuning. The platform is publicly available at Energy-Arena.org.
papers.chineseTitle: 能源竞技场：运营能源预测的动态基准平台
papers.chineseAbstract: 能源预测研究长期面临可比性不足的问题，导致难以准确衡量随时间推移所取得的持续进展。由于模型评估往往基于特定研究的数据集、时间段、信息集和评分设置，而广泛使用的基准和竞赛数据集通常与固定的历史窗口绑定，因此报告的准确性提升往往无法直接比较。本文引入了能源竞技场（Energy-Arena），这是一个用于运营能源时间序列预测的动态基准平台，随着能源系统的演变，该平台提供持续更新的参考点。该平台采用开放的、基于API的提交系统，并标准化挑战定义和提交截止日期，以符合运营约束。通过滚动评估窗口和持久排行榜报告性能。通过从回顾性回测转向前瞻性基准测试，能源竞技场强制实施标准化的事前提交和事后评估，从而通过防止信息泄露和事后调整来提高透明度。该平台可在Energy-Arena.org上公开访问。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法规范但缺乏前沿性，实证较扎实，影响力较大，可读性清晰。
papers.summary: 提出动态基准平台Energy-Arena，提升能源预测透明度。

papers.title: Bootstrapping with AI/ML-generated labels
papers.abstract: AI/ML methods are increasingly used in economics to generate binary variables (or labels) via classification algorithms. When these generated variables are included as covariates in regressions, even small misclassification errors can induce large biases in OLS estimators and invalidate standard inference. We study whether the bootstrap can correct this bias and deliver valid inference. We first show that a seemingly natural fixed-label bootstrap, which generates data using estimated labels but relies on a corrupted version in estimation, is generally invalid unless a strong independence condition between the latent true labels and other covariates holds. We then propose a coupled-label bootstrap that jointly resamples the true and imputed labels, and show it is valid without this condition. Two finite-sample adjustments further improve coverage: a variance correction for uncertainty in estimated misclassification rates and a Hessian rotation for near-singular designs. We illustrate the methods in simulations and apply them to investigate the relationship between wages and remote work status.
papers.chineseTitle: 使用AI/ML生成标签的自助法
papers.chineseAbstract: 在经济学中，AI/ML方法越来越多地被用于通过分类算法生成二元变量（或标签）。当这些生成的变量作为协变量纳入回归分析时，即使是很小的分类错误也可能在OLS估计量中引入较大的偏差，并使标准推断失效。本文研究了自助法是否能够纠正这种偏差并提供有效的推断。首先，本文指出了一种看似自然的固定标签自助法，该方法使用估计的标签生成数据，但在估计过程中依赖于一个被污染的版本，除非潜在的真实标签与其他协变量之间存在强独立性条件，否则这种方法通常是无效的。然后，本文提出了一种耦合标签自助法，该方法同时对真实标签和插补标签进行重采样，并证明了在不满足上述条件的情况下该方法仍然有效。两种有限样本调整进一步提高了覆盖范围：一种是对估计的分类错误率的不确定性进行方差校正，另一种是对接近奇异的设计进行Hessian旋转。本文通过模拟实验说明了这些方法，并将它们应用于研究工资与远程工作状态之间的关系。
papers.scoreReasoning: 本文提出了耦合标签自助法，创新性较强，方法严谨，实证较扎实，对经济学研究有较大影响，且可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出耦合标签自助法，有效纠正AI/ML生成标签的偏差。

papers.title: Difference-in-differences with a mediator
papers.abstract: Causal mediation analysis is a powerful tool for disentangling the total effect of a treatment into its direct effect on the outcome and its indirect effect mediated through an intermediate variable. However, in observational studies, confounding between treatment and potential outcomes typically renders the total and natural effects non-identifiable. In this work, we advance mediation analysis within the difference-in-differences framework. Under a mediator-adjusted parallel trends assumption and additional conditions, we demonstrate that natural indirect, direct, and total effects are identifiable in the treated group. We further derive efficient influence functions for these estimands, enabling the construction of multiply robust and nonparametrically efficient estimators. We establish the asymptotic properties of these estimators. Applying our methodology to data from the Job Corps Study, we find that job training significantly increases both short-term and long-term earnings, after controlling for the indirect effect through the proportion of weeks employed.
papers.chineseTitle: 带有中介变量的双重差分法
papers.chineseAbstract: 因果中介分析是一种强大的工具，用于将治疗的总效应分解为对结果的直接效应和通过中间变量产生的间接效应。然而，在观察性研究中，治疗与潜在结果之间的混杂通常使得总效应和自然效应无法识别。在本研究中，我们在双重差分框架内推进了中介分析。在中介调整的平行趋势假设和附加条件下，我们证明了在处理组中自然间接效应、直接效应和总效应是可识别的。我们进一步推导了这些估计量的有效影响函数，从而能够构建多重稳健且非参数有效的估计量。我们建立了这些估计量的渐近性质。将我们的方法应用于就业团研究的数据，我们发现，在控制了通过就业周数比例产生的间接效应后，职业培训显著提高了短期和长期收入。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 在双重差分框架内推进中介分析，识别自然效应。

papers.title: Identification and Estimation of Consumers' Preferences from Repeated Observations under Nonlinear Pricing
papers.abstract: We develop a nonparametric approach to identify and estimate consumer preferences and unobserved heterogeneity under nonlinear price schedules. Leveraging variation across multiple price schedules, we show that both the utility function and the distribution of preference types can be nonparametrically identified. The quantile function of unobserved types becomes solution of a functional equation, and we derive conditions ensuring identification. We propose an iterative approach for estimation, in which the regularization bias decays exponentially in the number of iterations while the variance grows only polynomially, yielding a near-parametric convergence rate. We propose a valid bootstrap procedure for finite-sample inference and extend the framework to accommodate potential endogeneity of prices and additional observed heterogeneity. Monte Carlo simulations and an empirical application to data from a European mail carrier demonstrate how we can recover the utility functions and preference distributions in finite samples.
papers.chineseTitle: 非线性定价下基于重复观测的消费者偏好识别与估计
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文提出了一种非参数方法，用于在非线性价格体系下识别和估计消费者偏好及未观测到的异质性。通过利用多个价格体系间的变化，我们证明了效用函数和偏好类型分布均可通过非参数方法进行识别。未观测类型的分位数函数成为了一个函数方程的解，我们推导了确保识别的条件。我们提出了一种迭代估计方法，其中正则化偏差随迭代次数指数级衰减，而方差仅多项式级增长，从而实现了接近参数的收敛速度。我们提出了一种有效的自助法程序用于有限样本推断，并将框架扩展至容纳价格潜在内生性和额外观测到的异质性。蒙特卡洛模拟和对一家欧洲邮递公司数据的实证应用展示了我们如何在有限样本中恢复效用函数和偏好分布。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在非线性定价下识别消费者偏好有显著创新，方法严谨，实证充分，但影响力尚待观察，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出非参数方法识别非线性定价下消费者偏好及异质性。

papers.title: The Core in a Distributional Economy
papers.abstract: An economy, large or small, has traditionally been defined in terms of an explicit set of agents and an assignment of characteristics to each agent. But when individual agents are negligible, most economically relevant properties of an economy can be defined in terms of the distribution of characteristics alone. Agents need not be specified.   It has been frequently asserted that the distributional description of an economy is too sparse for core analysis. Notions of coalitions and blocking require the individualistic description of agents. This paper shows that this is not so. The presence of blocking coalitions can be directly identified in terms of distributions alone. Indeed, we give a purely distributional proof of the classical core-equivalence theorem that delivers the core-equivalence theorem for individualistic economies as a corollary.   Our methods have applications outside of general equilibrium theory. They apply to large matching markets and to analogs of the Shapley-value for atomless economies.
papers.chineseTitle: 分配经济中的核心
papers.chineseAbstract: 无论经济规模大小，传统上都是通过一组明确的主体以及为每个主体分配的特征来定义的。然而，当个体主体微不足道时，经济的大多数相关属性可以仅通过特征的分布来定义，而无需具体指定主体。人们经常断言，经济的分配描述对于核心分析来说过于简略。联盟和阻塞的概念需要个体的描述。本文表明事实并非如此。阻塞联盟的存在可以直接仅通过分布来识别。事实上，我们给出了一个纯粹基于分布的经典核心等价定理的证明，该证明将个体主义经济的核心等价定理作为推论得出。我们的方法在一般均衡理论之外也有应用。它们适用于大型匹配市场以及无原子经济的沙普利值类似物。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在理论上有显著创新，方法严谨，但实证部分较弱，整体影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出仅通过特征分布识别阻塞联盟，证明核心等价定理。

papers.title: Coordination in complex environments
papers.abstract: Coordination is an important aspect of innovative contexts, where: the more innovative a course of action, the more uncertain its outcome. To study the interplay of coordination and informational ``complexity'', I embed a beauty-contest game into a complex environment. I identify a new conformity phenomenon. This effect may push towards the exploration of unknown alternatives or constitute a status-quo bias, depending on the network structure of players' interactions. In an application, I show that an organization with decentralized authority can implement profit maximization in a sufficiently complex environment.
papers.chineseTitle: 复杂环境中的协调问题
papers.chineseAbstract: 协调是创新环境中的一个重要方面，其中行动方案的创新性越强，其结果的不确定性就越大。为了研究协调与信息“复杂性”之间的相互作用，本文将一个选美比赛博弈嵌入到一个复杂环境中。本文识别出一种新的从众现象。这种效应可能会推动对未知替代方案的探索，也可能构成一种现状偏见，具体取决于玩家互动的网络结构。在一个应用案例中，本文展示了在足够复杂的环境中，一个具有分散权力的组织可以实现利润最大化。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出了新的从众现象，方法严谨，但实证稍弱，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 识别复杂环境中协调的新从众现象，并展示分散权力组织的利润最大化。

papers.title: Linear estimations of dynamic fixed effects logit models only with time effects
papers.abstract: This paper proposes linear estimation methods for dynamic fixed effects logit models only with time effects (i.e., those only with time dummies and only with time trends). The linear estimators point-identify transformations of parameters of interest for the models if five or more time periods are provided and then point-identify the parameters of interest. What it boils down to is that root-N consistent estimations are attainable for these models. Monte Carlo results corroborate this conclusion.
papers.chineseTitle: 仅含时间效应的动态固定效应Logit模型的线性估计方法
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文提出了仅含时间效应（即仅含时间虚拟变量和仅含时间趋势）的动态固定效应Logit模型的线性估计方法。如果提供五个或更多时间段，线性估计量可以点识别模型中感兴趣参数的变换形式，进而点识别感兴趣的参数。归根结底，这些模型可以实现根号N一致的估计。蒙特卡洛模拟结果证实了这一结论。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在方法论上有一定创新，实证较扎实，但影响力尚待观察，整体可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出动态固定效应Logit模型的线性估计方法，实现根号N一致估计。

papers.abstract: This paper studies the transmission of productivity shocks in general equilibrium production networks, when firms in different sectors operate under informational rigidity and rely on external debt. Rigidity breaks the Modigliani-Miller irrelevance of leverage and may generate default following shocks, even in equilibrium.   The economy consists of firms, banks, and consumers. Under proportional shock transmission, we prove that a unique Walrasian rigid equilibrium exists and provide explicit expressions for equilibrium quantities, prices, and interest rates. On the other hand, we prove that welfare is smaller than in the first best if and only if both leverage and rigidity exist. We provide conditions for default cascades to occur and study two examples of default propagation.
papers.chineseTitle: 生产网络中的刚性与违约
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了在一般均衡生产网络中，当不同行业的企业在信息刚性下运营并依赖外部债务时，生产率冲击的传导机制。刚性打破了莫迪利安尼-米勒定理中杠杆无关性的假设，即使在均衡状态下也可能引发违约。经济体系由企业、银行和消费者构成。在比例冲击传导的假设下，本文证明了唯一瓦尔拉斯刚性均衡的存在，并给出了均衡数量、价格和利率的显式表达式。一方面，本文表明，即使在无杠杆的情况下，刚性的存在也会导致Hulten定理失效。另一方面，本文证明了只有当杠杆和刚性同时存在时，福利才会低于最优水平。杠杆和刚性增加了债务的总成本，并对杠杆部门产生通胀效应，这些效应会向下游传播，同时将消费和劳动力向上游转移。违约的发生仅取决于实际冲击和网络结构，而损失的大小还取决于经济的连通性和相关部门的债务成本。本文提供了违约级联发生的条件，并研究了两个违约传播的例子。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法论严谨，实证分析较扎实，影响力较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 揭示了生产网络中刚性与违约的传导机制及其经济影响。

papers.title: Misspecification-Averse Estimation
papers.abstract: We study optimal estimation when the likelihood may be misspecified. Building on tools from the theory of decision-making under uncertainty, we analyze a class of axiomatically grounded optimality criteria which nests several existing misspecification-robust objectives. Within this class, we introduce the constrained multiplier criterion, which allows for flexible misspecification attitudes. We prove a local asymptotic minimax theorem for this criterion, extending a classical efficiency bound to a limit experiment which incorporates moment-constrained misspecification concerns. We characterize asymptotically optimal estimators as Bayes decision rules under a flat prior and an exponentially tilted likelihood that incorporates the moment constraints, and show that feasible plug-in analogs are asymptotically optimal.
papers.chineseTitle: 规避错误设定的估计方法
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了在似然函数可能存在错误设定情况下的最优估计问题。基于不确定性决策理论工具，我们分析了一类公理化基础上的最优性准则，该准则涵盖了多种现有的对错误设定具有稳健性的目标函数。在这一类准则中，我们引入了约束乘数准则，该准则允许对错误设定持有灵活的态度。我们为这一准则证明了一个局部渐近极小极大定理，将经典的效率边界扩展到一个包含矩约束错误设定担忧的极限实验中。我们刻画了渐近最优估计量，它们是在平坦先验和包含矩约束的指数倾斜似然函数下的贝叶斯决策规则，并表明可行的插入式类似物是渐近最优的。
keywords: 局部渐近极小极大定理
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在错误设定估计领域有显著创新，方法严谨，但实证部分稍显薄弱，整体可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出约束乘数准则，证明局部渐近极小极大定理，刻画渐近最优估计量。

papers.title: Estimation of MIDAS Regressions with Errors-in-the-Variables
papers.abstract: In this paper, a Mixed Data Sampling (MIDAS) model is studied when both low and high frequency variables are contaminated with measurement error. It is shown that the profile likelihood estimator becomes inconsistent in the presence of measurement error. Using the corrected score approach along with profile likelihood approach, a consistent estimator for parameters of MIDAS Measurement Error model is proposed. Small and large sample properties of the estimator are examined by performing a monte carlo simulation study and considering the effect of sample size, number of lags and profiling parameter.
papers.chineseTitle: 含变量误差的MIDAS回归估计
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了当低频和高频变量均受到测量误差污染时，混合数据抽样（MIDAS）模型的情况。研究显示，在存在测量误差的情况下，轮廓似然估计量变得不一致。通过采用校正分数方法结合轮廓似然方法，本文提出了MIDAS测量误差模型参数的一致估计量。通过进行蒙特卡洛模拟研究，并考虑样本大小、滞后数和轮廓参数的影响，本文检验了该估计量的小样本和大样本性质。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出了新估计方法，创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性良好。
papers.summary: 提出了含变量误差的MIDAS模型参数一致估计量。

papers.title: Mitigate or Fail: How Risk Management Shapes Cybersecurity Competency
papers.abstract: Contemporary cybersecurity governance assumes that professionals apply risk reasoning. Yet major organisational failures persist despite investment in tools, staffing, and credentials. This study investigates the structural source of that paradox. Cybersecurity speaks the language of risk, but its training architecture has shaped the profession to think in terms of threats. A sequential mixed-methods design integrated four analyses; NLP of the NIST NICE Framework v2.0.0 (2,111 TKS statements), SEM (n = 126 cybersecurity professionals), a control-group comparison (n = 133 general professionals), and thematic coding of seven leadership interviews. Four convergent findings emerged. First, "likelihood" and "probability" appear zero times across all TKS statements. Risk management content accounts for 4.5% of high-confidence semantic classifications, ranking 18th of 29 competency domains. NICE codifies threat-management activity while invoking risk mainly at the category level. Second, SEM showed that training exposure significantly predicts risk management competence directly and indirectly through conceptual salience, for a total effect of Beta = .629. However, the theoretically four-dimensional competence construct collapsed into a single factor, indicating epistemic compression. Third, cybersecurity professionals showed no measurable advantage over the general professional population in foundational risk reasoning; only 11.9% showed high differentiation. Fourth, all seven leaders expected Likelihood x Impact reasoning, yet five did not articulate the formula themselves. These findings support a structural conclusion: cybersecurity has taken professional form as a threat-management discipline that has borrowed risk vocabulary. Remediation requires redesign of professional formation, not marginal curriculum reform.
papers.chineseTitle: 缓解或失败：风险管理如何塑造网络安全能力
papers.chineseAbstract: 当代网络安全治理假设专业人员应用风险推理。然而，尽管在工具、人员配备和资质方面进行了投资，重大组织失败事件仍然持续发生。本研究调查了这一悖论的结构性根源。网络安全使用风险的语言，但其培训架构已将该职业塑造为以威胁为思考方式的职业。本研究采用顺序混合方法设计，整合了四项分析：对NIST NICE框架v2.0.0（2111条TKS声明）的自然语言处理（NLP）、结构方程模型（SEM，n=126名网络安全专业人员）、对照组比较（n=133名普通专业人员）以及对七位领导者的主题编码访谈。研究得出了四个一致的发现。首先，在所有TKS声明中，“可能性”和“概率”出现次数为零。风险管理内容在高置信度语义分类中占4.5%，在29个能力领域中排名第18。NICE将威胁管理活动编码化，而主要在类别层面提及风险。其次，SEM显示，培训暴露通过概念显著性直接和间接预测风险管理能力，总效应为Beta=0.629。然而，理论上四维的能力结构坍缩为一个单一因素，表明知识压缩。第三，网络安全专业人员在基础风险推理方面没有显示出可测量的优势；只有11.9%的人表现出高度分化。第四，所有七位领导者都期望“可能性×影响”推理，但其中五位并未自己阐述该公式。这些发现支持了一个结构性结论：网络安全已作为威胁管理学科形成专业，并借用了风险词汇。补救措施需要重新设计专业形成，而非边缘性的课程改革。
papers.scoreReasoning: 研究创新性显著，方法严谨，实证充分，但影响力和可读性一般，整体表现优秀。
papers.summary: 揭示网络安全专业培训中风险管理能力的结构性缺陷。

papers.title: Calibeating Prediction-Powered Inference
papers.abstract: We study semisupervised mean estimation with a small labeled sample, a large unlabeled sample, and a black-box prediction model whose output may be miscalibrated. A standard approach in this setting is augmented inverse-probability weighting (AIPW) [Robins et al., 1994], which protects against prediction-model misspecification but can be inefficient when the prediction score is poorly aligned with the outcome scale. We introduce Calibrated Prediction-Powered Inference, which post-hoc calibrates the prediction score on the labeled sample before using it for semisupervised estimation. This simple step requires no retraining and can improve the original score both as a predictor of the outcome and as a regression adjustment for semisupervised inference. We study both linear and isotonic calibration. For isotonic calibration, we establish first-order optimality guarantees: isotonic post-processing can improve predictive accuracy and estimator efficiency relative to the original score and simpler post-processing rules, while no further post-processing of the fitted isotonic score yields additional first-order gains. For linear calibration, we show first-order equivalence to PPI++. We also clarify the relationship among existing estimators, showing that the original PPI estimator is a special case of AIPW and can be inefficient when the prediction model is accurate, while PPI++ is AIPW with empirical efficiency maximization [Rubin et al., 2008]. In simulations and real-data experiments, our calibrated estimators often outperform PPI and are competitive with, or outperform, AIPW and PPI++. We provide an accompanying Python package, ppi_aipw, at https://larsvanderlaan.github.io/ppi-aipw/.
papers.chineseTitle: 校准预测驱动的推断
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了在小规模有标签样本、大规模无标签样本以及输出可能未校准的黑箱预测模型下的半监督均值估计问题。在此情境下，一种标准方法是增强逆概率加权（AIPW），该方法能抵御预测模型误设，但当预测分数与结果尺度不匹配时效率可能较低。本文引入了校准预测驱动的推断方法，该方法在利用预测分数进行半监督估计前，先在有标签样本上对其进行后验校准。这一简单步骤无需重新训练，既能提升原始分数作为结果预测器的性能，也能改善其作为半监督推断回归调整项的效果。本文研究了线性和等渗校准两种方法。对于等渗校准，本文建立了其一阶最优性保证：等渗后处理能提升预测准确性和估计量效率，优于原始分数和更简单的后处理规则，且对拟合的等渗分数进行进一步后处理不会带来额外的一阶增益。对于线性校准，本文展示了其与PPI++的一阶等价性。此外，本文还阐明了现有估计量之间的关系，指出原始PPI估计量是AIPW的特例，在预测模型准确时可能效率低下，而PPI++则是具有经验效率最大化的AIPW。在模拟和真实数据实验中，本文的校准估计量往往优于PPI，且与AIPW和PPI++相比具有竞争力或更优。本文还提供了一个配套的Python包ppi_aipw，可在https://larsvanderlaan.github.io/ppi-aipw/获取。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出了校准预测驱动的推断方法，创新性较强，方法论严谨，实证充分，但可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出校准预测驱动的推断方法，提升半监督均值估计效率。

papers.title: Ideological Bias in LLMs' Economic Causal Reasoning
papers.abstract: Do large language models (LLMs) exhibit systematic ideological bias when reasoning about economic causal effects? As LLMs are increasingly used in policy analysis and economic reporting, where directionally correct causal judgments are essential, this question has direct practical stakes. We present a systematic evaluation by extending the EconCausal benchmark with ideology-contested cases - instances where intervention-oriented (pro-government) and market-oriented (pro-market) perspectives predict divergent causal signs. From 10,490 causal triplets (treatment-outcome pairs with empirically verified effect directions) derived from top-tier economics and finance journals, we identify 1,056 ideology-contested instances and evaluate 20 state-of-the-art LLMs on their ability to predict empirically supported causal directions. We find that ideology-contested items are consistently harder than non-contested ones, and that across 18 of 20 models, accuracy is systematically higher when the empirically verified causal sign aligns with intervention-oriented expectations than with market-oriented ones. Moreover, when models err, their incorrect predictions disproportionately lean intervention-oriented, and this directional skew is not eliminated by one-shot in-context prompting. These results highlight that LLMs are not only less accurate on ideologically contested economic questions, but systematically less reliable in one ideological direction than the other, underscoring the need for direction-aware evaluation in high-stakes economic and policy settings.
papers.chineseTitle: 大型语言模型在经济因果推理中的意识形态偏见
papers.chineseAbstract: 当大型语言模型（LLMs）推理经济因果效应时，是否会表现出系统的意识形态偏见？随着LLMs在政策分析和经济报道中的应用日益广泛，在这些领域中，方向正确的因果判断至关重要，因此这一问题具有直接的实践意义。本研究通过扩展EconCausal基准，纳入意识形态争议案例——即干预导向（亲政府）和市场导向（亲市场）视角预测因果符号分歧的实例，进行了系统评估。我们从顶级经济学和金融期刊中提取了10,490个因果三元组（具有经验验证效应方向的处理-结果对），识别出1,056个意识形态争议实例，并评估了20个最先进的LLMs预测经验支持因果方向的能力。我们发现，意识形态争议项始终比非争议项更难，且在20个模型中的18个中，当经验验证的因果符号与干预导向预期一致时，准确性系统性地高于与市场导向预期一致时。此外，当模型出错时，其错误预测不成比例地倾向于干预导向，且这种方向性偏差无法通过单次上下文提示消除。这些结果表明，LLMs在意识形态争议的经济问题上不仅准确性较低，而且在一个意识形态方向上系统性地比另一个方向更不可靠，凸显了在高风险经济和政策环境中进行方向感知评估的必要性。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文选题新颖，方法规范，实证充分，但可读性一般，影响力待观察。
papers.summary: 揭示LLMs在经济因果推理中存在意识形态偏见。

papers.title: Flexible Bayesian Models for Time-Varying Income Distributions
papers.abstract: Survey data are widely used to study how income inequality, poverty, and welfare evolve over time. A common practice is to estimate the income distribution separately for each year, treating annual observations as independent cross-sections. For population subgroups with relatively small sample sizes, however, this approach can produce unstable parameter estimates, imprecise inference for inequality and poverty measures, and potentially misleading posterior probabilities of Lorenz and stochastic dominance. This paper develops flexible Bayesian models for time-varying income distributions that borrow strength across adjacent years by allowing the parameters of income distributions to evolve dynamically. We consider a random walk specification and an extended model with shrinkage priors. The proposed framework yields coherent inference for the full income distributions over time, as well as for associated inequality measures, poverty indices, and dominance probabilities. Simulation studies show that, relative to independent year-by-year models, the proposed approach produces substantially more precise and stable inference, while avoiding spurious variation in welfare comparisons. An application to the Aboriginal and residents of the Australian Capital Territory (ACT) population subgroups in the Household, Income and Labour Dynamics in Australia survey shows that the dynamic models deliver improved inference for income distributions and related welfare measures, and can change conclusions about distributional dominance over time.
papers.chineseTitle: 时变收入分布的灵活贝叶斯模型
papers.chineseAbstract: 调查数据被广泛用于研究收入不平等、贫困和福利如何随时间演变。一种常见做法是分别估计每年的收入分布，将年度观测视为独立的横截面数据。然而，对于样本量相对较小的群体，这种方法可能导致参数估计不稳定、不平等和贫困度量推断不精确，以及洛伦兹和随机占优的后验概率可能产生误导。本文开发了时变收入分布的灵活贝叶斯模型，通过允许收入分布参数动态演变，从而在相邻年份间借用信息。我们考虑了随机游走规范和带有收缩先验的扩展模型。所提出的框架为整个时期的收入分布以及相关的不平等度量、贫困指数和占优概率提供了连贯的推断。模拟研究表明，与独立的逐年模型相比，所提出的方法产生了更精确和稳定的推断，同时避免了福利比较中的虚假变化。对澳大利亚家庭、收入和劳动力动态调查中澳大利亚首都领地（ACT）的原住民和居民子群体的应用表明，动态模型为收入分布和相关福利度量提供了改进的推断，并可能改变关于分布占优随时间变化的结论。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在方法论和实证上表现稳健，创新性显著，但实证部分略显薄弱，整体影响较大。
papers.summary: 开发时变收入分布的贝叶斯模型，改进推断并影响占优结论。

papers.title: Participation and Representation in Local Government Speech
papers.abstract: Local government meetings are the most common formal channel through which residents speak directly with elected officials, contest policies, and shape local agendas. However, data constraints typically limit the empirical study of these meetings to agendas, single cities, or short time horizons. We collect and transcribe a massive new dataset of city council meetings from 115 California cities over the last decade, using advanced transcription and diarization techniques to analyze the speech content of the meetings themselves. We document two sets of descriptive findings: First, city council meetings are frequent, long, and vary modestly across towns and time in topical content. Second, public participants are substantially older, whiter, more male, more liberal, and more likely to own homes than the registered voter population, and public participation surges when topics related to land use and zoning are included in meeting agendas. Given this skew, we examine the main policy lever municipalities have to shift participation patterns: meeting access costs. Exploiting pandemic-era variation in remote access, we show that eliminating remote options reduces the number of speakers, but does not clearly change the composition of speakers. Collectively, these results provide the most comprehensive empirical portrait to date of who participates in local democracy, what draws them in, and how institutional design choices shape both the volume and composition of public input.
papers.chineseTitle: 地方政府会议中的参与与代表性
papers.chineseAbstract: 地方政府会议是居民与当选官员直接对话、质疑政策以及影响地方议程的最常见正式渠道。然而，数据限制通常使这些会议的实证研究局限于议程、单一城市或短时间范围。本文收集并转录了过去十年中来自115个加州城市的市议会会议的大量新数据集，利用先进的转录和 diarization 技术分析会议本身的发言内容。本文记录了两组描述性发现：首先，市议会会议频繁、冗长，且在不同城镇和时间上的主题内容变化不大。其次，与注册选民群体相比，公共参与者年龄更大、白人更多、男性更多、更自由主义，且更可能拥有住房，而当会议议程中包含与土地使用和分区相关的主题时，公共参与度会激增。鉴于这种偏差，本文研究了市政当局改变参与模式的主要政策杠杆：会议准入成本。利用疫情期间远程访问的变化，本文表明取消远程选项会减少发言者数量，但不会明显改变发言者的构成。这些结果共同提供了迄今为止关于谁参与地方民主、什么吸引他们参与以及制度设计选择如何影响公共意见的数量和构成的最为全面的实证描述。
papers.scoreReasoning: 研究视角新颖，方法规范，实证充分，但创新性一般，可读性尚可。
papers.summary: 揭示地方政府会议参与者的特征及影响因素。

papers.title: Nonparametric Point Identification of Treatment Effect Distributions via Rank Stickiness
papers.abstract: Treatment effect distributions are not identified without restrictions on the joint distribution of potential outcomes. Existing approaches either impose rank preservation -- a strong assumption -- or derive partial identification bounds that are often wide. We show that a single scalar parameter, rank stickiness, suffices for nonparametric point identification while permitting rank violations. The identified joint distribution -- the coupling that maximizes average rank correlation subject to a relative entropy constraint, which we call the Bregman-Sinkhorn copula -- is uniquely determined by the marginals and rank stickiness. Its conditional distribution is an exponential tilt of the marginal with a Bregman divergence as the exponent, yielding closed-form conditional moments and rank violation probabilities; the copula nests the comonotonic and Gaussian copulas as special cases. The empirical Bregman-Sinkhorn copula converges at the parametric $\sqrt{n}$-rate with a Gaussian process limit, despite the infinite-dimensional parameter space. We apply the framework to estimate the full treatment effect distribution, derive a variance estimator for the average treatment effect tighter than the Fréchet--Hoeffding and Neyman bounds, and extend to observational studies under unconfoundedness.
papers.chineseTitle: 通过秩粘性实现处理效应分布的非参数点识别
papers.chineseAbstract: 在不对潜在结果的联合分布施加限制的情况下，处理效应分布是无法识别的。现有方法要么施加秩保持这一强假设，要么推导出通常较宽的部分识别边界。本文表明，单个标量参数——秩粘性，足以在允许秩违反的情况下实现处理效应分布的非参数点识别。所识别的联合分布——即在相对熵约束下使平均秩相关性最大化的耦合，我们称之为Bregman-Sinkhorn连接函数——由边际分布和秩粘性唯一确定。其条件分布是边际分布的指数倾斜，以Bregman散度为指数，从而得出封闭形式的条件矩和秩违反概率；该连接函数将共单调和正态连接函数作为特例。尽管参数空间是无限维的，但经验Bregman-Sinkhorn连接函数以参数√n的速率收敛到高斯过程极限。我们将该框架应用于估计完整的处理效应分布，推导出比Fréchet-Hoeffding和Neyman边界更紧的平均处理效应方差估计量，并将其扩展到无混杂假设下的观察性研究。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，但可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出秩粘性参数，实现处理效应分布的非参数点识别。

papers.title: Post-AGI Economies: Autonomy and the First Fundamental Theorem of Welfare Economics
papers.abstract: The First Fundamental Theorem of Welfare Economics assumes that welfare-bearing agents are autonomous and implicitly relies on a binary distinction between autonomy and instrumentality. Welfare subjects are those who have autonomy and therefore the capacity to choose and enter into utility comparisons, while everything else does not. In post-AGI economies this presupposition becomes nontrivial because artificial systems may exhibit varying degrees of autonomy, functioning as tools, delegates, strategic market actors, manipulators of choice environments, or possible welfare subjects. We argue that the theorem ought to be subject to an autonomy qualification where the impact of these changes in autonomy assumptions is incorporated. Using a minimal general-equilibrium model with autonomy-conditioned welfare, welfare-status assignment, delegation accounting, and verification institutions, we set out conditions for which autonomy-complete competitive equilibrium is autonomy-Pareto efficient. The classical theorem is recovered as the low-autonomy limit.
papers.chineseTitle: 后AGI经济：自主性与福利经济学第一基本定理
papers.chineseAbstract: 福利经济学第一基本定理假定承载福利的主体是自主的，并隐含地依赖于自主性与工具性之间的二元区分。福利主体是那些具有自主性，因此有能力进行选择并参与效用比较的对象，而其他一切则不具备这种能力。在后AGI经济中，这一前提变得不再微不足道，因为人工系统可能表现出不同程度的自主性，它们可以作为工具、代表、战略市场参与者、选择环境的操纵者或可能的福利主体。我们认为，该定理应受到自主性条件的限制，其中应纳入这些自主性假设变化的影响。我们使用一个包含自主性条件福利、福利状态分配、委托核算和验证机构的最小一般均衡模型，设定了自主性完全竞争均衡是自主性帕累托有效的条件。经典定理被恢复为低自主性极限。
