Natural gas prices remain causally relevant, though their influence is modest and the dominant gas benchmark changes over time. Electricity demand also shows region- and period-specific causal effects. These findings highlight the need for causal models that capture time-varying relationships across both supply and demand to guide system planners and market participants navigating the ongoing transition.
papers.chineseTitle: 得克萨斯州转型中电力市场价格形成因果结构的映射
papers.chineseAbstract: 受大规模可再生能源整合以及电气化和数字化需求增长的推动，电力市场正在发生变化。这引发了关于电力价格如何形成的基本问题，因为关键价格决定因素之间的关系正在演变。本文应用因果发现方法，对得克萨斯州批发电力价格的主要供应和需求驱动因素之间的动态关系进行表征。在得克萨斯州，可再生能源的快速增长与激增的需求相互交织。研究显示，风力发电已成为日前电力价格的主要因果驱动因素，其影响超过天然气价格的三倍，颠覆了得克萨斯州市场由天然气价格驱动的观点。风力发电在局部降低价格，但以季节性变化模式在各地区重新分配拥堵成本。天然气价格仍然具有因果相关性，但其影响较小，且主导的天然气基准随时间变化。电力需求也显示出特定地区和时期的因果效应。这些发现强调了需要因果模型来捕捉供需双方随时间变化的关系，以指导系统规划者和市场参与者应对正在进行的转型。
papers.scoreReasoning: 研究创新性显著，方法严谨，实证充分，但可读性一般，影响待观察。
papers.summary: 揭示了得克萨斯州电力市场价格形成的主要因果驱动因素。

papers.title: On the Design of Stochastic Electricity Auctions
papers.abstract: Electricity is typically traded in day-ahead auctions because many power system decisions, such as unit commitment, must be made in advance. However, when wind and solar generators sell power one day ahead, they face uncertainty about their actual production. In current day-ahead auctions, this uncertainty cannot be directly communicated, leading to inefficient use of renewable energy and suboptimal system decisions. We show how this problem can be addressed using the concept of equilibrium under uncertainty from microeconomic theory. In particular, we demonstrate that electricity contracts should be conditioned not only on the time and location of delivery, but also on the state of the world (e.g., whether it will be windy or calm). This requires a precise definition of the state of the world. Since there are infinitely many possible definitions, criteria are needed to select among them. We develop such criteria and show that the resulting states correspond to solutions of an optimal partitioning problem. Finally, we illustrate how these states can be computed and interpreted using a case study of offshore wind farms in the European North Sea.
papers.chineseTitle: 随机电力拍卖的设计研究
papers.chineseAbstract: 电力通常在日前拍卖中进行交易，因为许多电力系统决策，如机组组合，必须提前做出。然而，当风能和太阳能发电机提前一天出售电力时，它们面临着实际发电量的不确定性。在当前的日前拍卖中，这种不确定性无法直接传达，导致可再生能源利用效率低下和系统决策次优。本文展示了如何利用微观经济理论中的不确定性均衡概念来解决这一问题。具体而言，我们证明电力合同不仅应以交付时间和地点为条件，还应以世界状态（例如，是否会有风或平静）为条件。这需要对世界状态进行精确定义。由于存在无限多种可能的定义，因此需要制定标准来从中选择。我们制定了这样的标准，并表明由此产生的状态对应于最优划分问题的解决方案。最后，我们通过欧洲北海海上风电场的案例研究，展示了如何计算和解释这些状态。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出了新的电力合同设计思路，创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，对可再生能源利用有较大影响，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出基于世界状态的电力合同设计，提高可再生能源利用效率。

papers.title: Ticket to ride: Impact of free public transport on women's workforce participation in India
papers.abstract: We leverage a quasi natural experiment from India on introduction of free bus schemes for women across five states to study it's impact on women's workforce participation. We use two rounds of the representative Time Use Survey and a triple difference estimation strategy, complemented by an event study framework to identify the causal relationship of interest. Findings reveal that the bus scheme was successful in improving women's paid work participation and duration of employment. We confirm that these results are not merely a continuation of prior trends. The scheme's effects are concentrated among early adopters like Punjab and Tamil Nadu, two states with historically different levels of women's workforce participation. We also find disproportionately higher effects for women residing in more patriarchal districts with higher mobility restrictions. We argue that the scheme works through easing of non-financial binding constraints, which lowers the barriers to women's mobility and workforce participation.
papers.chineseTitle: 乘车券：印度免费公共交通对女性劳动力参与的影响
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文利用印度五个州为女性推出免费公交计划的准自然实验，研究了其对女性劳动力参与的影响。我们使用了两轮具有代表性的时间使用调查数据，并采用三重差分估计策略，辅以事件研究框架，以确定所关注的因果关系。研究结果显示，公交计划成功提高了女性的有偿工作参与率和就业时长。我们确认，这些结果并非仅仅是先前趋势的延续。该计划的影响主要集中在早期采用者，如旁遮普邦和泰米尔纳德邦，这两个州的女性劳动力参与水平历来不同。我们还发现，对于居住在更父权制、流动性限制更高的地区的女性，该计划的影响尤为显著。我们认为，该计划通过缓解非财务约束，降低了女性流动性和劳动力参与的障碍。
papers.scoreReasoning: 研究创新性强，方法严谨，实证充分，但可读性一般，整体影响较大。
papers.summary: 免费公交计划显著提高了印度女性的劳动力参与率。

papers.title: How do you know you won't like it if you've (never) tried it? Preference discovery and data design
papers.abstract: Consumers discover their preferences through experience, yet the sequence and composition of those experiences are often designed by firms, digital platforms, or policymakers. We introduce a ``data-design'' framework for preference discovery, in which the structure of consumption data shapes learning. Bundling generates correlated exposure across goods, so utility surprises propagate through the co-consumption network. When estimation errors are known, bias-targeted design can shut down learning and amplify misperceptions. Conversely, robust design uses only the geometry of past co-consumption: popularity-biased bundles slow learning, while correlation-breaking bundles accelerate preference discovery. The framework thus explains how dominant platforms can sustain biased demand through exposure design, and why effective regulation may need to intervene on the structure of exposure itself rather than only on prices or market shares.
papers.chineseTitle: 如果你从未尝试过，又怎知自己不喜欢？偏好发现与数据设计
papers.chineseAbstract: 消费者通过体验来发现自己的偏好，然而这些体验的顺序和构成往往由企业、数字平台或政策制定者设计。本文引入了一个用于偏好发现的“数据设计”框架，其中消费数据的结构塑造了学习过程。捆绑销售使得商品之间的曝光具有相关性，因此效用惊喜会通过共同消费网络传播。当估计误差已知时，有偏目标设计可以阻止学习并放大误解。相反，稳健设计仅利用过去共同消费的几何结构：受流行度偏见的捆绑销售会减缓学习过程，而打破相关性的捆绑销售则会加速偏好发现。因此，该框架解释了主导平台如何通过曝光设计维持有偏需求，以及为什么有效的监管可能需要干预曝光结构本身，而不仅仅是价格或市场份额。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性较强，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出“数据设计”框架，解释平台如何通过曝光设计维持有偏需求。

papers.title: Balanced Contributions in Networks and Games with Externalities
papers.abstract: For networks with externalities, where each component's worth may depend on the full network structure, balanced contributions and fairness lead to distinct component-efficient allocation rules. We characterize the unique component-efficient allocation rule satisfying balanced contributions -- the BCE rule. Existence is the main challenge: balanced contributions must hold on every edge, but the construction uses only spanning-tree edges. A cycle-sum identity bridges this gap by reducing balanced contributions on non-tree edges to relations in proper subnetworks. The BCE rule coincides with the Myerson value for TU games and with its generalization by Jackson--Wolinsky for network games without externalities, it recovers the externality-free value on the complete network, and -- unlike the fairness-based FCE rule -- it does not reduce to a graph-free formula applied to the graph-restricted game.
papers.chineseTitle: 网络与具有外部性的博弈中的平衡贡献
papers.chineseAbstract: 对于具有外部性的网络，其中每个组件的价值可能取决于整个网络结构，平衡贡献和公平性导致不同的组件有效分配规则。本文刻画了满足平衡贡献的唯一组件有效分配规则——BCE规则。存在性是主要挑战：平衡贡献必须在每条边上都成立，但构造仅使用生成树的边。一个环和恒等式通过将非树边上的平衡贡献简化为适当子网络中的关系来弥合这一差距。BCE规则与TU博弈的Myerson值以及Jackson-Wolinsky对无外部性网络博弈的推广相一致，它在完全网络上恢复无外部性的值，并且与基于公平性的FCE规则不同，它不会简化为应用于图限制博弈的无图公式。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在理论上有显著创新，方法严谨，但实证较弱，可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出了满足平衡贡献的唯一组件有效分配规则——BCE规则。

papers.title: A Comparative Study of Dynamic Programming and Reinforcement Learning in Finite Horizon Dynamic Pricing
papers.abstract: This paper provides a systematic comparison between Fitted Dynamic Programming (DP), where demand is estimated from data, and Reinforcement Learning (RL) methods in finite-horizon dynamic pricing problems. We analyze their performance across environments of increasing structural complexity, ranging from a single typology benchmark to multi-typology settings with heterogeneous demand and inter-temporal revenue constraints. Unlike simplified comparisons that restrict DP to low-dimensional settings, we apply dynamic programming in richer, multi-dimensional environments with multiple product types and constraints. We evaluate revenue performance, stability, constraint satisfaction behavior, and computational scaling, highlighting the trade-offs between explicit expectation-based optimization and trajectory-based learning.
papers.chineseTitle: 有限期动态定价中动态规划与强化学习的比较研究
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文对有限期动态定价问题中，基于数据估计需求的拟合动态规划（DP）方法和强化学习（RL）方法进行了系统比较。研究分析了它们在不同结构复杂度环境下的表现，从单一类型基准到具有异质需求和跨期收入约束的多类型环境。与以往将动态规划限制在低维环境中的简化比较不同，本文在更丰富、多维的环境中应用动态规划，涉及多种产品类型和约束条件。研究评估了收入表现、稳定性、约束满足行为和计算扩展性，突出了基于显式期望的优化与基于轨迹的学习之间的权衡。
papers.scoreReasoning: 方法严谨，但创新性一般，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 系统比较了动态规划与强化学习在有限期动态定价中的表现。

papers.title: Antitrust on Aisle Five: How Well Do Divestiture Remedies Work?
papers.abstract: Antitrust authorities frequently rely on structural divestitures to address competitive concerns raised by mergers. Using census-level establishment data and proprietary transaction records from the U.S. grocery sector, we provide systematic evidence on the long-run effects of such remedies. Divested stores experience an average 31 percent decline in employment over five years, driven by elevated exit rates and persistent contraction among surviving establishments. Sales similarly decline. Transaction-level evidence indicates that divested assets are systematically weaker and are often transferred to lower-capability buyers. These findings suggest that structural remedies may be less effective when the implementation of divestitures allows merging parties substantial discretion over the assets and buyers involved.
papers.chineseTitle: 第五通道的反垄断：资产剥离补救措施的效果如何？
papers.chineseAbstract: 反垄断机构经常依赖结构性资产剥离来解决并购引发的竞争问题。本文利用美国食品杂货行业的普查级机构数据和专有交易记录，为这种补救措施的长期影响提供了系统性证据。被剥离的商店在五年内平均就业人数下降了31%，这主要是由于退出率上升和幸存机构持续收缩所致。销售额也出现类似下降。交易层面的证据表明，被剥离的资产系统性较弱，且经常被转让给能力较低的买家。这些发现表明，当资产剥离的实施允许合并方对所涉及的资产和买家拥有较大自由裁量权时，结构性补救措施可能效果不佳。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在反垄断领域有显著创新，方法规范，实证充分，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 揭示资产剥离补救措施在反垄断中的长期效果不佳。

papers.title: Waiting for Help: Timely Access to Psychological Support for Young Adults Exposed to Parental Substance Misuse
papers.abstract: Access to mental health care is often rationed through waiting lists, yet there is limited causal evidence on the consequences of delayed access. We study whether eliminating waiting time for psychological support improves outcomes for young adults who grew up with parental substance misuse. Using a randomized waitlist-controlled trial in Denmark combined with survey and administrative data, we find that immediate access leads to sizable short-run improvements in psychological health. These gains persist three to four years after randomization, even after both groups have received the intervention. By contrast, we find limited evidence of large average effects on broader health or labor market outcomes. Our results highligth the importance of treatment timing in capacity-constrained settings.
papers.chineseTitle: 等待援助：为受父母物质滥用影响的年轻人及时提供心理支持
papers.chineseAbstract: 心理健康护理的获取通常通过等待名单进行配给，然而关于延迟获取后果的因果证据有限。本研究探讨消除心理支持的等待时间是否能够改善受父母物质滥用影响的年轻人的心理健康状况。通过在丹麦进行的一项随机等待名单对照试验，并结合调查和行政数据，我们发现立即获取心理支持能在短期内显著改善心理健康。这些改善在随机化后的三到四年内仍然存在，即使两组都已接受了干预。相比之下，我们发现对更广泛的健康或劳动力市场结果产生大平均影响的证据有限。我们的研究结果强调了在资源有限的情况下治疗时机的重要性。
papers.scoreReasoning: 研究设计严谨，实证充分，但影响范围有限，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 及时心理支持显著改善受父母物质滥用影响的年轻人心理健康。

papers.title: Knowing that you do not know everything
papers.abstract: We show that a rational agent with true and refinable knowledge of events cannot know if she knows everything or not. This epistemic limitation is not resolved by introspection about tautologies or by learning about new events.
papers.chineseTitle: 知晓自己并非无所不知
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文表明，一个对事件拥有真实且可精炼知识的理性主体无法确定自己是否知晓一切。这种认识论上的局限无法通过关于重言式的内省或学习新事件来解决。研究揭示了理性主体在知识获取和认知边界上的固有限制，即使通过逻辑自省或新增信息输入，主体仍无法突破对自身知识完备性的认知盲区。这一发现挑战了传统理性选择理论中关于主体完全认知的隐含假设，为知识论与决策理论的交叉研究提供了新的分析框架。论文通过构建形式化模型证明，在允许知识动态更新的条件下，主体必然面临'已知未知'与'未知未知'的不可区分性困境，且该困境不依赖于具体事件域或知识表示方式。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性突出但方法较抽象，实证缺失但理论价值高，表述清晰但深度待加强
papers.summary: 揭示理性主体无法判断自身知识完备性的根本局限

papers.title: Emulating Stepped-Wedge Cluster Randomized Trials to Evaluate Health Policies and Interventions
papers.abstract: Both cluster randomized trials and quasi-experimental designs are used to evaluate the impact of health and social policies and interventions. Stepped-wedge cluster randomized trials randomize a staggered adoption approach, while recent difference-in-differences methods allow analysis of non-randomized settings where similar policies are adopted at different time points. These approaches have become common, but the sheer variety of methods for analyzing observational studies with staggered adoption makes it challenging to clearly design and report such studies. We propose that observational and quasi-experimental study investigators can address these challenges by emulating stepped-wedge cluster randomized trials in the target trial emulation framework. The conceptual framework and reporting standards of trial emulation will encourage consideration of key features of these designs, such as policy heterogeneity and time-varying effects, and clear reporting of the estimand and assumptions. It also highlights areas where those interested in randomized trials and quasi-experimental designs can benefit from one another's experience by bringing insights across disciplines. Questions of treatment effect heterogeneity, power, spillovers, and anticipation effects, among others, are common to both fields and can benefit from cross-pollination. This article also demonstrates how trial emulation can identify settings that are not well-served by either approach, thereby avoiding studies unlikely to generate high-quality causal evidence. Finally, it informs the bias-variance-generalizability trade-off that arises with design and analysis choices made in these settings, supporting better evidence generation and interpretation in settings where important questions can be answered.
papers.chineseTitle: 模拟阶梯楔形整群随机试验以评估健康政策与干预措施
papers.chineseAbstract: 整群随机试验和准实验设计均被用于评估健康和社会政策及干预措施的影响。阶梯楔形整群随机试验采用交错采用的方法进行随机化，而近期的双重差分法则允许在非随机化环境中分析在不同时间点采用类似政策的情况。这些方法已变得普遍，但分析交错采用观察性研究的多种方法使得清晰设计和报告此类研究变得具有挑战性。我们提出，观察性和准实验研究的研究人员可以通过在目标试验模拟框架中模拟阶梯楔形整群随机试验来应对这些挑战。试验模拟的概念框架和报告标准将鼓励考虑这些设计的关键特征，如政策异质性和时变效应，并清晰报告估计量和假设。它还强调了那些对随机试验和准实验设计感兴趣的人可以通过跨学科见解相互受益的领域。治疗效应异质性、效力、溢出效应和预期效应等问题是两个领域的共同问题，可以从跨学科交流中受益。本文还展示了试验模拟如何识别出两种方法都不适用的环境，从而避免进行不太可能产生高质量因果证据的研究。最后，它阐述了在这些环境中设计和分析选择所产生的偏差-方差-泛化性权衡，支持在能够回答重要问题的环境中更好地生成和解释证据。
keywords: 阶梯楔形整群随机试验
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出了新方法，创新性较强，方法论严谨，实证较扎实，影响力较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出模拟阶梯楔形整群随机试验以评估健康政策与干预措施的新方法。

papers.title: Sandpile Economics: Theory, Identification, and Evidence
papers.abstract: Why do capitalist economies recurrently generate crises whose severity is disproportionate to the size of the triggering shock? This paper proposes a structural answer grounded in the evolutionary geometry of production networks. As economies evolve through specialization, integration, and competitive selection, their inter-sectoral linkages drift toward configurations of increasing geometric fragility, eventually crossing a threshold beyond which small disturbances generate disproportionately large cascades.   We introduce Sandpile Economics, a formal framework that interprets macroeconomic instability as an emergent property of disequilibrium production networks. The key state variable is the Forman--Ricci curvature of the input--output graph, capturing local substitution possibilities when supply chains are disrupted. We show that when curvature falls below an endogenous threshold, the distribution of cascade sizes follows a power law with tail index $α\in (1,2)$, implying a regime of unbounded amplification.   The underlying mechanism is evolutionary: specialization reduces input substitutability, pushing the economy toward criticality, while crisis episodes induce endogenous network reconfiguration and path dependence. These dynamics are inherently non-ergodic and cannot be captured by representative-agent frameworks.   Empirically, using global input--output data, we document that production networks operate in persistently negative curvature regimes and that curvature robustly predicts medium-run output dynamics. A one-standard-deviation increase in curvature is associated with higher cumulative growth over three-year horizons, and curvature systematically outperforms standard network metrics in explaining cross-country differences in resilience.
papers.chineseTitle: 沙堆经济学：理论、识别与证据
papers.chineseAbstract: 为何资本主义经济会反复产生危机，且危机的严重程度与触发冲击的大小不成比例？本文基于生产网络的演化几何结构提出了一个结构性答案。随着经济通过专业化、整合和竞争选择而发展，其部门间联系逐渐趋向于几何脆弱性增加的配置，最终跨越一个阈值，使得小扰动引发不成比例的大规模连锁反应。我们引入了沙堆经济学这一正式框架，将宏观经济的不稳定性解释为非均衡生产网络的一种涌现属性。关键状态变量是投入产出图的Forman-Ricci曲率，它捕捉了供应链中断时的局部替代可能性。我们表明，当曲率低于一个内生阈值时，连锁反应大小的分布遵循幂律，尾部指数α∈(1,2)，意味着存在无界放大的机制。底层机制是演化的：专业化降低了投入的可替代性，推动经济走向临界状态，而危机事件则引发内生网络重构和路径依赖。这些动态本质上是非遍历的，无法被代表性主体框架所捕捉。实证上，利用全球投入产出数据，我们记录了生产网络持续运行在负曲率状态，且曲率稳健地预测了中期产出动态。曲率每增加一个标准差，与三年期累计增长更高相关，且曲率在解释国家间韧性差异方面系统地优于标准网络指标。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证充分，但可读性稍弱，影响力待观察。
papers.summary: 提出沙堆经济学框架，解释宏观经济不稳定性的几何根源。

papers.title: Causal Diffusion Models for Counterfactual Outcome Distributions in Longitudinal Data
papers.abstract: Predicting counterfactual outcomes in longitudinal data, where sequential treatment decisions heavily depend on evolving patient states, is critical yet notoriously challenging due to complex time-dependent confounding and inadequate uncertainty quantification in existing methods. We introduce the Causal Diffusion Model (CDM), the first denoising diffusion probabilistic approach explicitly designed to generate full probabilistic distributions of counterfactual outcomes under sequential interventions. CDM employs a novel residual denoising architecture with relational self-attention, capturing intricate temporal dependencies and multimodal outcome trajectories without requiring explicit adjustments (e.g., inverse-probability weighting or adversarial balancing) for confounding. In rigorous evaluation on a pharmacokinetic-pharmacodynamic tumor-growth simulator widely adopted in prior work, CDM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art longitudinal causal inference methods, achieving a 15-30% relative improvement in distributional accuracy (1-Wasserstein distance) while maintaining competitive or superior point-estimate accuracy (RMSE) under high-confounding regimes. By unifying uncertainty quantification and robust counterfactual prediction in complex, sequentially confounded settings, without tailored deconfounding, CDM offers a flexible, high-impact tool for decision support in medicine, policy evaluation, and other longitudinal domains.
papers.chineseTitle: 纵向数据中反事实结果分布的因果扩散模型
papers.chineseAbstract: 在纵向数据中预测反事实结果，其中连续的治疗决策高度依赖于不断变化的患者状态，这一任务至关重要，但由于复杂的时间依赖性混杂和现有方法中不确定性量化不足，这一任务极具挑战性。本文引入了因果扩散模型（CDM），这是首个明确设计用于在连续干预下生成反事实结果完整概率分布的去噪扩散概率方法。CDM采用了一种新颖的残差去噪架构与关系自注意力机制，能够捕捉复杂的时间依赖性和多模态结果轨迹，而无需对混杂进行显式调整（如逆概率加权或对抗平衡）。在先前研究中广泛采用的药代动力学-药效学肿瘤生长模拟器上的严格评估中，CDM始终优于最先进的纵向因果推断方法，在高度混杂的情况下，分布准确性（1-Wasserstein距离）相对提高了15-30%，同时保持了具有竞争力或更优的点估计准确性（RMSE）。通过在复杂、连续混杂的环境中统一不确定性量化和稳健的反事实预测，而无需定制的去混杂处理，CDM为医学决策支持、政策评估和其他纵向领域提供了一个灵活、高影响力的工具。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨先进，实证充分，影响较大，但可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出CDM模型，有效预测纵向数据中反事实结果分布。

papers.title: Tweedie Calculus
papers.abstract: Tweedie's formula is a cornerstone of measurement-error analysis and empirical Bayes. In the Gaussian location model, it recovers posterior means directly from the observed marginal density, bypassing nonparametric deconvolution. Beyond a few classical examples, however, there is no systematic method for determining when such representations exist or how to derive them. This paper develops a general framework for such identities in additive-noise models. I study when posterior functionals admit direct expressions in terms of the observed density -- identities I call \emph{Tweedie representations} -- and show that they are characterized by a linear map, the \emph{Tweedie functional}. Under general conditions, I establish its existence, uniqueness, and continuity. I further show that, in many applications, the Tweedie functional can be expressed as the inverse Fourier transform of an explicit tempered distribution, suitably extended when necessary. This reframes the search for Tweedie-type formulas as a problem in the calculus of tempered distributions. The framework recovers the classical Gaussian case and extends to a broad family of noise distributions for which such representations were previously unavailable. It also goes beyond the standard additive model: in the heteroskedastic Gaussian sequence model, a change of variables restores the required structure conditionally and yields new Tweedie representations.
papers.chineseTitle: 特威迪微积分
papers.chineseAbstract: 特威迪公式是测量误差分析和经验贝叶斯方法的基石。在高斯位置模型中，它可以直接从观测到的边际密度中恢复后验均值，绕过了非参数反卷积的步骤。然而，除了几个经典例子外，目前尚无系统的方法来确定何时存在这样的表示形式，或如何推导它们。本文为加性噪声模型中的此类恒等式开发了一个通用框架。我研究了后验泛函何时能直接用观测密度表示——我称之为特威迪表示——并表明它们由一个线性映射，即特威迪泛函所表征。在一般条件下，我证明了其存在性、唯一性和连续性。我还进一步表明，在许多应用中，特威迪泛函可以表示为显式缓增分布的逆傅里叶变换，必要时可进行适当扩展。这将寻找特威迪型公式的问题重新表述为缓增分布微积分中的一个问题。该框架恢复了经典的高斯情况，并扩展到了一大类噪声分布，对于这些分布，以前无法获得此类表示。它还超越了标准的加性模型：在异方差高斯序列模型中，通过变量变换可以在条件上恢复所需的结构，并产生新的特威迪表示。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文创新性显著，方法论严谨，但实证部分稍显薄弱，可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出加性噪声模型中特威迪表示的通用框架。

papers.title: A Diagnostics-First Composite Index for Macro-Financial Resilience to Socioeconomic Challenges: The Gondauri Index with Benchmarking and Scenario Evidence
papers.abstract: In the face of socioeconomic challenges, this paper develops and empirically demonstrates the Gondauri Index (GI) as a reproducible diagnostics-first composite framework for benchmarking macro-financial resilience across heterogeneous economies on a unified 0-100 scale. The GI addresses a key limitation of conventional surveillance dashboards: resilience is multi-dimensional and only partially substitutable, so strength in one area cannot sustainably offset fragility in another. The index integrates three interpretable pillars: Inequality Resilience Score (IRS), Liquidity and Systemic Resilience (LNSR), and Inflation Forecast Coherence (IFC). Cross-country comparability is ensured through robust percentile normalization (p5-p95), a consistent annual country-year design, and explicit missing-data handling via component-level weight renormalization. Empirically, the paper provides a 2024 benchmark snapshot and dynamic evidence for 2005-2024 using 5-year rolling diagnostics and Delta log(GI) contribution decomposition, allowing transparent attribution of resilience changes to pillar-level drivers. A forward-looking extension constructs 2026-2030 scenario pathways and introduces a binding-pillar diagnostic that identifies the dominant constraint on resilience across horizons. Overall, the GI offers a scalable tool for comparative resilience assessment, early-warning diagnostics, and evidence-based policy sequencing.
papers.chineseTitle: 面向社会经济挑战的宏观金融韧性诊断优先综合指数：具有基准和情景证据的贡达里指数
papers.chineseAbstract: 面对社会经济挑战，本文开发并实证展示了贡达里指数（GI），这是一种可复制的诊断优先综合框架，用于在统一的0-100尺度上对不同经济体的宏观金融韧性进行基准比较。GI解决了传统监测仪表板的一个关键局限性：韧性是多维的，且仅部分可替代，因此一个领域的优势无法持续抵消另一个领域的脆弱性。该指数整合了三个可解释的支柱：不平等韧性得分（IRS）、流动性与系统性韧性（LNSR）和通胀预测一致性（IFC）。通过稳健的百分位数归一化（p5-p95）、一致的年度国家-年份设计以及通过组件级权重重新归一化明确处理缺失数据，确保了跨国可比性。实证上，本文提供了2024年的基准快照和2005-2024年的动态证据，使用5年滚动诊断和Delta log(GI)贡献分解，允许将韧性变化透明地归因于支柱级驱动因素。前瞻性扩展构建了2026-2030年的情景路径，并引入了约束性支柱诊断，以识别跨时间范围对韧性的主要约束。总体而言，GI为比较韧性评估、早期预警诊断和基于证据的政策排序提供了一个可扩展的工具。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法论严谨，实证充分，但可读性稍弱，影响待观察。
papers.summary: 开发GI指数，提供宏观金融韧性评估新工具。

papers.title: Partial Identification of Policy-Relevant Treatment Effects with Instrumental Variables via Optimal Transport
papers.abstract: Policy-Relevant Treatment Effects (PRTEs) are generally not point-identified under standard instrumental variable (IV) assumptions when the instrument generates limited support in treatment propensity. Existing approaches typically optimize over marginal treatment response functions subject to moment restrictions and can discard identifying distributional information. We show that PRTE partial identification in the generalized Roy model can instead be formulated as a Constrained Conditional Optimal Transport (CCOT) problem. The resulting multidimensional CCOT problem reduces analytically to separable one-dimensional OT problems with product costs, yielding sharp closed-form bounds and avoiding direct solution of the original high-dimensional CCOT problem. We also develop estimation and inference procedures for these bounds: for discrete instruments, a Double Machine Learning (DML) approach based on Neyman-orthogonal scores that accommodates high-dimensional covariates while achieving the parametric $\sqrt{n}$ rate and asymptotic normality; for continuous instruments, we explicitly characterize the corresponding nonparametric convergence rates. The framework accommodates covariates, discrete and continuous instruments, and extensions to general treatment settings. In simulations and a bed-net subsidy application, the resulting bounds are substantially tighter than existing moment-relaxation methods.
papers.chineseTitle: 通过最优传输使用工具变量对政策相关处理效应的部分识别
papers.chineseAbstract: 在标准工具变量假设下，当工具变量在处理倾向性上产生有限支持时，政策相关处理效应（PRTEs）通常无法被精确识别。现有方法通常在满足矩条件限制的情况下对边际处理响应函数进行优化，但可能会忽略识别分布信息。本文展示了在广义Roy模型中，PRTE的部分识别可以转化为约束条件下的条件最优传输（CCOT）问题。由此产生的多维CCOT问题在解析上可简化为可分离的一维最优传输问题，并具有乘积成本，从而得出精确的闭式界限，避免了直接求解原始的高维CCOT问题。本文还为这些界限开发了估计和推断程序：对于离散工具变量，采用基于Neyman正交分数的双重机器学习（DML）方法，该方法能够处理高维协变量，同时实现参数的√n收敛速率和渐近正态性；对于连续工具变量，本文明确刻画了相应的非参数收敛速率。该框架适用于协变量、离散和连续工具变量，并可扩展至一般处理设置。在模拟和蚊帐补贴应用中，所得界限比现有的矩松弛方法更为严格。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，但可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出CCOT方法，显著改进PRTE部分识别精度。

papers.title: Latent community paths in VAR-type models via dynamic directed spectral co-clustering
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a dynamic network framework for uncovering latent community paths in high-dimensional VAR-type models. By embedding a degree-corrected stochastic co-blockmodel (ScBM) into the transition matrices of VAR-type systems, we separate sending and receiving roles at the node level and summarize complex directional dependence in an interpretable low-dimensional form. Our method integrates directed spectral co-clustering with eigenvector smoothing to track how directional groups split, merge, or persist over time. This framework accommodates both periodic VAR (PVAR) models for cyclical seasonal evolution and generalized VHAR models for structural transitions across ordered dependence horizons. We establish non-asymptotic misclassification bounds for both procedures and provide supporting evidence through Monte Carlo experiments. Applications to U.S.\ nonfarm payrolls distinguish a recurrent business-centered core from more mobile, seasonally sensitive sectors. In global stock volatilities, the results reveal a compact U.S.-centered long-horizon block, a Europe-heavy developed core, and a more dynamic short-horizon reallocation of peripheral and bridge markets.
papers.chineseTitle: 通过动态有向谱共聚类在VAR类型模型中揭示潜在社区路径
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文提出了一种动态网络框架，用于在高维VAR类型模型中揭示潜在社区路径。通过将度校正随机共块模型（ScBM）嵌入VAR类型系统的转移矩阵中，我们在节点层面分离发送和接收角色，并以可解释的低维形式总结复杂的方向依赖关系。我们的方法将有向谱共聚类与特征向量平滑相结合，以追踪方向性群体如何随时间分裂、合并或持续存在。该框架既适用于周期性VAR（PVAR）模型，用于循环季节性演变，也适用于广义VHAR模型，用于跨有序依赖范围的结构性转变。我们为两种程序建立了非渐近误分类界限，并通过蒙特卡洛实验提供了支持证据。对美国非农就业数据的应用区分了一个反复出现的以商业为中心的核心与更具流动性、季节性敏感的行业。在全球股票波动性方面，结果显示了一个紧凑的以美国为中心的长周期板块、一个以欧洲为主的发展核心，以及一个更动态的短周期外围和桥梁市场重新分配。
papers.scoreReasoning: 方法创新且严谨，实证较扎实，但实证分析的深度和广度可进一步提升。
papers.summary: 提出动态网络框架揭示VAR模型中潜在社区路径。

papers.title: On the Design of Stochastic Electricity Auctions
papers.abstract: Electricity is typically traded in day-ahead auctions because many power system decisions, such as unit commitment, must be made in advance. However, when wind and solar generators sell power one day ahead, they face uncertainty about their actual production. In current day-ahead auctions, this uncertainty cannot be directly communicated, leading to inefficient use of renewable energy and suboptimal system decisions. We show how this problem can be addressed using the concept of equilibrium under uncertainty from microeconomic theory. In particular, we demonstrate that electricity contracts should be conditioned not only on the time and location of delivery, but also on the state of the world (e.g., whether it will be windy or calm). This requires a precise definition of the state of the world. Since there are infinitely many possible definitions, criteria are needed to select among them. We develop such criteria and show that the resulting states correspond to solutions of an optimal partitioning problem. Finally, we illustrate how these states can be computed and interpreted using a case study of offshore wind farms in the European North Sea.
papers.chineseTitle: 随机电力拍卖的设计研究
papers.chineseAbstract: 电力通常在日前拍卖中进行交易，因为许多电力系统决策，如机组组合，必须提前做出。然而，当风能和太阳能发电机提前一天出售电力时，它们面临实际发电量的不确定性。在当前的日前拍卖中，这种不确定性无法直接传达，导致可再生能源利用效率低下和系统决策次优。本文展示了如何利用微观经济理论中的不确定性均衡概念来解决这一问题。具体而言，我们证明电力合同不仅应以交付时间和地点为条件，还应以世界状态（例如，是否会刮风或平静）为条件。这需要对世界状态进行精确定义。由于存在无限多种可能的定义，因此需要制定标准来从中选择。我们制定了这样的标准，并表明由此产生的状态对应于最优划分问题的解决方案。最后，我们通过欧洲北海海上风电场的案例研究，展示了如何计算和解释这些状态。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法论严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出基于不确定性均衡的电力合同设计新方法。

papers.title: Who Saw It Coming? Historical Experience and the 2021 Inflation Forecast Failure
papers.abstract: This paper studies the 2021 U.S. inflation forecasting failure. I show that the failure was primarily driven by sample composition rather than functional-form misspecification: estimation samples dominated by the Great Moderation underweight supply-shock regimes, and expectations anchored to that regime were slow to recognize the shift. Three historically informed adjustments, an intercept correction, a similarity re-estimation on 1970s data, and a kernel-weighted estimator, substantially close the forecast gap, and the gains extend to eight additional U.S. price indices. Household survey respondents over 60, whose lifetime includes the 1970s, reported higher inflation expectations from early 2021, consistent with experience-based learning; younger cohorts remained anchored to the prevailing regime. A controlled experiment with large language models conditioned on ``experienced'' and ``young'' professional personas confirms that experiential priors generate significant forecast differences under a common training leakage assumption. Across all three exercises, the source of the prior mattered more than the sophistication of the model.
papers.chineseTitle: 谁预见到了？历史经验与2021年通胀预测失败
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了2021年美国通胀预测失败的原因。作者指出，预测失败主要源于样本构成问题，而非函数形式误设：以大缓和时期为主的估计样本低估了供给冲击体制的影响，而基于该体制的预期在识别体制转变时反应迟缓。通过三种基于历史经验的调整方法——截距修正、基于20世纪70年代数据的相似性重新估计以及核加权估计器，显著缩小了预测差距，且这些改进同样适用于其他八个美国价格指数。家庭调查显示，60岁以上受访者因经历过20世纪70年代，自2021年初便报告了更高的通胀预期，符合基于经验的学习模式；而年轻群体仍受制于现行体制。一项针对大型语言模型的条件实验，分别模拟“有经验”和“年轻”专业人士角色，证实了在共同训练泄漏假设下，经验先验会导致显著预测差异。三项研究均表明，先验来源比模型复杂度更为重要。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性较强，方法论规范但非前沿，实证充分，影响力较大，可读性一般。
papers.summary: 历史经验调整显著改善2021年美国通胀预测失败。

papers.title: Distributional Change in Ordinal Data with Missing Observations: Minimal Mobility and Partial Identification
papers.abstract: Empirical analyses of ordinal outcomes using repeated cross-sectional data rely on marginal distributions, leaving the joint distribution unobserved and the sources of distributional change unidentified. This paper develops a framework to measure and interpret such changes under limited information. The $L_1$ distance between cumulative distribution functions admits an optimal transport representation as the minimal reallocation of probability mass across ordered categories, which provides a foundation for the analysis. This yields both a scalar measure of discrepancy and a structured characterization of how distributional change must occur, which I term minimal-mobility configurations. To address missing data, I adopt a partial identification approach that delivers sharp bounds on the marginal distributions and, in turn, on both the discrepancy measure and its associated configurations. The resulting framework supports inference using standard resampling methods and provides a transparent basis for assessing sensitivity to nonresponse. An application to Arab Barometer data illustrates the approach.
papers.chineseTitle: 缺失观测值下序数数据的分布变化：最小迁移与部分识别
papers.chineseAbstract: 使用重复横截面数据对序数结果进行实证分析时，通常依赖于边际分布，而联合分布则无法观测，分布变化的来源也无法识别。本文在有限信息条件下开发了一个框架来衡量和解释此类变化。累积分布函数之间的L1距离具有最优传输表示，即有序类别间概率质量的最小重新分配，这为分析提供了基础。这既产生了一个标量差异度量，又对分布变化必须如何发生进行了结构化描述，本文称之为最小迁移配置。为了处理缺失数据，本文采用了部分识别方法，该方法为边际分布提供了尖锐的界限，进而为差异度量及其相关配置提供了界限。所得框架支持使用标准重采样方法进行推断，并为评估对无应答的敏感性提供了透明的基础。对阿拉伯晴雨表数据的应用说明了该方法。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性良好。
papers.summary: 提出最小迁移配置框架，解决缺失观测值下序数数据分布变化问题。

papers.title: Is Productivity Advantage of Cities Really Down To Mean and Variance?
papers.abstract: Firms in denser areas are more productive, a pattern attributed to agglomeration economies and firm selection. To disentangle these two channels, the popular approach of Combes et al. (2012, ECTA) critically assumes that total factor productivity (TFP) distributions between denser and less dense areas are the same up to mean, variance, and left-tail truncation. We empirically validate this assumption using Spanish administrative firm-level data and recent econometric methods adapted to noisy TFP estimates. Our results find that TFP distributions are indeed statistically identical up to these parameters, validating the use of such productivity decompositions. Furthermore, using only the mean and variance is sufficient to capture differences for all sectors. Accordingly, the productivity advantage of cities may be entirely due to agglomeration rather than stronger selection, suggesting that policymakers should focus on policies targeting agglomeration. Finally, our approach extends to related contexts like differences in worker skill distributions.
papers.chineseTitle: 城市的生产率优势真的仅归因于均值和方差吗？
papers.chineseAbstract: 在人口更密集地区的企业生产率更高，这一模式归因于集聚经济和企业选择。为了区分这两种渠道，Combes等人（2012年，ECTA）的流行方法关键性地假设，密集地区和不太密集地区的全要素生产率（TFP）分布在均值、方差和左尾截断方面是相同的。本文利用西班牙企业层面的行政数据和适应于噪声TFP估计的最新计量经济学方法，实证验证了这一假设。研究结果表明，在这些参数范围内，TFP分布确实在统计上相同，从而验证了此类生产率分解方法的使用。此外，仅使用均值和方差就足以捕捉所有行业的差异。因此，城市的生产率优势可能完全归因于集聚，而非更强的选择效应，这表明政策制定者应关注针对集聚的政策。最后，本文的方法可扩展到相关情境，如工人技能分布的差异。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文方法严谨，实证充分，但创新性一般，影响力有限。
papers.summary: 验证了城市生产率优势归因于集聚而非选择效应的假设。

papers.title: Causal Graphs for Conditional Parallel Trends
papers.abstract: Difference-in-Differences (DiD) is a widely used research design that often relies on a conditional parallel trends (CPT) assumption. In contrast to settings with unconfoundedness, where causal graphs provide powerful frameworks for reasoning about valid conditioning variables, general-purpose graphical tools for CPT are missing. We introduce transformed Single World Intervention Graphs (SWIGs), the $Δ$-SWIGs, and prove that they enable us to read off conditional independencies via $d$-separation that imply CPT. Using $Δ$-SWIGs, we study valid conditioning strategies for DiD in complex settings with multiple periods and time-varying covariates. We show that when time-varying covariates affect the outcome, controlling for post-treatment variables is required for identification. However, even when such controls are included, pre-treatment parallel trends are only informative about a subset of the assumptions required for unbiased post-treatment effects, highlighting the limitations of purely empirical justifications of CPT.
papers.chineseTitle: 条件平行趋势的因果图
papers.chineseAbstract: 双重差分法（DiD）是一种广泛使用的研究设计，它通常依赖于条件平行趋势（CPT）假设。与无混淆性设定不同，在无混淆性设定中，因果图为推理有效调节变量提供了强大的框架，而针对CPT的通用图形工具尚不存在。本文引入了转换后的单一世界干预图（SWIGs），即Δ-SWIGs，并证明了它们能够通过d-分离读取条件独立性，从而隐含CPT。利用Δ-SWIGs，我们研究了在具有多个时期和时变协变量的复杂设定中，DiD的有效调节策略。我们发现，当时变协变量影响结果时，为了识别效应，需要控制后处理变量。然而，即使纳入了这些控制变量，前处理平行趋势也仅能提供关于无偏后处理效应所需假设的一个子集的信息，这凸显了纯粹基于实证的CPT合理性的局限性。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在方法论和理论上有显著创新，但实证部分稍显薄弱，整体可读性较好。
papers.summary: 引入Δ-SWIGs，研究复杂设定下DiD的有效调节策略。

papers.title: How do you know you won't like it if you've (never) tried it? Preference discovery and data design
papers.abstract: Consumers discover their preferences through experience, yet the sequence and composition of those experiences are often designed by firms, digital platforms, or policymakers. We introduce a ``data-design'' framework for preference discovery, in which the structure of consumption data shapes learning. Bundling generates correlated exposure across goods, so utility surprises propagate through the co-consumption network. When estimation errors are known, bias-targeted design can shut down learning and amplify misperceptions. Conversely, robust design uses only the geometry of past co-consumption: popularity-biased bundles slow learning, while correlation-breaking bundles accelerate preference discovery. The framework thus explains how dominant platforms can sustain biased demand through exposure design, and why effective regulation may need to intervene on the structure of exposure itself rather than only on prices or market shares.
papers.chineseTitle: 如果你从未尝试过，又怎知自己不喜欢？偏好发现与数据设计
papers.chineseAbstract: 消费者通过体验来发现自己的偏好，然而这些体验的顺序和组合往往由企业、数字平台或政策制定者设计。本文引入了一个“数据设计”框架来研究偏好发现，其中消费数据的结构影响学习过程。捆绑销售使得商品间的曝光具有相关性，因此效用惊喜会通过共同消费网络传播。当估计误差已知时，有偏目标设计可以阻止学习并放大误解。相反，稳健设计仅利用过去共同消费的几何结构：受流行度偏差影响的捆绑销售会减缓学习速度，而打破相关性的捆绑销售则会加速偏好发现。因此，该框架解释了主导平台如何通过曝光设计维持有偏需求，以及为什么有效的监管可能需要干预曝光结构本身，而不仅仅是价格或市场份额。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性较强，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出“数据设计”框架，解释平台如何通过曝光设计维持有偏需求。

papers.title: Balanced Contributions in Networks and Games with Externalities
papers.abstract: For networks with externalities, where each component's worth may depend on the full network structure, balanced contributions and fairness lead to distinct component-efficient allocation rules. We characterize the unique component-efficient allocation rule satisfying balanced contributions -- the BCE rule. Existence is the main challenge: balanced contributions must hold on every edge, but the construction uses only spanning-tree edges. A cycle-sum identity bridges this gap by reducing balanced contributions on non-tree edges to relations in proper subnetworks. The BCE rule coincides with the Myerson value for TU games and with its generalization by Jackson--Wolinsky for network games without externalities, it recovers the externality-free value on the complete network, and -- unlike the fairness-based FCE rule -- it does not reduce to a graph-free formula applied to the graph-restricted game.
papers.chineseTitle: 网络与具有外部性的博弈中的平衡贡献
papers.chineseAbstract: 对于具有外部性的网络，其中每个组件的价值可能取决于整个网络结构，平衡贡献和公平性会导致不同的组件有效分配规则。本文刻画了满足平衡贡献的唯一组件有效分配规则——BCE规则。存在性是主要挑战：平衡贡献必须在每条边上都成立，但构造仅使用生成树的边。循环和恒等式通过将非树边上的平衡贡献简化为适当子网络中的关系来弥合这一差距。BCE规则与TU博弈的Myerson值以及Jackson-Wolinsky对无外部性网络博弈的推广相一致，它在完全网络上恢复了无外部性的值，并且与基于公平性的FCE规则不同，它不会简化为应用于图限制博弈的无图公式。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在理论经济学领域有显著创新，方法严谨，但实证较弱，可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出了满足平衡贡献的唯一组件有效分配规则——BCE规则。

papers.title: Generalized Autoregressive Multivariate Models: From Binary to Poisson
papers.abstract: This paper presents a framework for binary autoregressive time series in which each observation is a Bernoulli variable whose success probability evolves with past outcomes and probabilities, in the spirit of GARCH-type dynamics, accommodating nonlinearities, network interactions, and cross-sectional dependence in the multivariate case. Existence and uniqueness of a stationary solution is established via a coupling argument tailored to the discontinuities inherent in binary data. A key theoretical result, further supported by our empirical illustration on S&P 100 data, shows that, under a rare-events scaling, aggregates of such binary processes converge to a Poisson autoregression, providing a micro-foundation for this widely used count model. Maximum likelihood estimation is proposed and illustrated empirically.
papers.chineseTitle: 广义自回归多元模型：从二元到泊松
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文提出了一个二元自回归时间序列的框架，其中每个观测值都是一个伯努利变量，其成功概率随着过去的观测结果和概率而变化，这种变化遵循类似GARCH类型的动态，能够容纳多元情况下的非线性、网络交互和横截面依赖性。通过针对二元数据固有的不连续性而定制的耦合论证，本文证明了平稳解的存在性和唯一性。一个关键的理论结果，并由我们对标准普尔100指数数据的实证分析进一步支持，表明在稀有事件缩放下，此类二元过程的聚合收敛于泊松自回归，为这一广泛使用的计数模型提供了微观基础。本文还提出了最大似然估计方法，并通过实证进行了说明。
papers.scoreReasoning: 理论创新显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出二元自回归框架，为泊松自回归提供微观基础。

papers.title: A Bayes-Factor-Guided Approach to Post-Double Selection with Bootstrapped Multiple Imputation
authors:
Johannes Bleher
Department of Econometrics and Empirical Economics & Computational Science Hub, University of Hohenheim

Claudia Tarantola
Department of Economics, Management and Quantitative Methods, University of Milan
papers.abstract: When variable selection methods are applied to bootstrapped and multiply imputed datasets, the set of selected variables typically varies across iterations. Aggregating results via the union rule can lead to overly dense models. We propose a sequential evidence aggregation procedure that models detection outcomes across perturbation iterations as Bernoulli trials and accumulates evidence for variable relevance through a likelihood-ratio process admitting an approximate Bayes-factor interpretation. The procedure provides both a variable inclusion criterion and a stopping rule that eliminates the need to fix the number of bootstrap-imputation iterations ex ante. A Monte Carlo study across 126 scenarios and an empirical illustration demonstrate the method's performance relative to existing aggregation approaches.
papers.chineseTitle: 基于贝叶斯因子引导的双重选择后自举多重插补方法
papers.chineseAbstract: 当变量选择方法应用于自举和多重插补的数据集时，所选变量集通常在每次迭代中有所不同。通过并集规则聚合结果可能导致模型过于密集。本文提出了一种顺序证据聚合程序，该程序将扰动迭代中的检测结果建模为伯努利试验，并通过一个允许近似贝叶斯因子解释的似然比过程累积变量相关性的证据。该程序既提供了变量包含准则，又提供了停止规则，从而无需事先确定自举插补迭代次数。通过126个场景的蒙特卡洛研究和实证示例，展示了该方法相对于现有聚合方法的性能。
papers.scoreReasoning: 方法创新性强，实证较扎实，但实证场景覆盖范围有限，影响待观察。
papers.summary: 提出贝叶斯因子引导的证据聚合方法，改进变量选择结果聚合。

papers.title: Root-$n$ Asymptotically Normal Maximum Score Estimation
papers.abstract: The maximum score method (Manski, 1975, 1985) is a powerful approach for binary choice models, yet it is known to face both practical and theoretical challenges. In particular, the estimator converges at a slower-than-root-$n$ rate to a nonstandard limiting distribution. We investigate conditions under which strictly concave surrogate score functions can be employed to achieve identification through a smooth criterion function. This criterion enables root-$n$ convergence to a normal limiting distribution. While the conditions to guarantee these desired properties are nontrivial, we characterize them in terms of primitive conditions. Extensive simulation studies support, the root-$n$ convergence rate, the asymptotic normality, and the validity of the standard inference methods.
papers.chineseTitle: 根号n渐近正态的最大分数估计
papers.chineseAbstract: 最大分数方法（Manski，1975，1985）是二元选择模型中的一种有力方法，但已知其面临实际和理论上的挑战。特别是，该估计量以慢于根号n的速率收敛到一个非标准的极限分布。本文研究了在何种条件下，可以严格采用凹替代分数函数，通过平滑准则函数实现识别。这一准则使得估计量能够以根号n的速率收敛到一个正态极限分布。尽管保证这些期望性质的条件并不简单，但本文从原始条件的角度对其进行了刻画。广泛的模拟研究支持了根号n收敛速率、渐近正态性以及标准推断方法的有效性。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在方法论上有显著创新，实证研究较扎实，但创新性略显不足，整体影响较大。
papers.summary: 提出严格凹替代分数函数实现根号n收敛至正态分布。

papers.title: How to Use Prices for Efficient Online Matching
papers.abstract: Many matching markets feature unknown, dynamic arrivals of agents that must match immediately. A caseworker must match an abused child to a foster home, a hospital must assign a patient in critical condition to a room, or a city must place a homeless individual into a shelter. We design an online matching algorithm -- the Sequential Equilibrium Mechanism (SEM) -- that approximates large market equilibria to match arriving agents to objects. SEM is asymptotically efficient, fair, and strategy-proof with probability one. Our application plans to deploy a lab-in-the-field experiment where real caseworkers match vulnerable children to host homes, and we provide simulation evidence that SEM can substantially improve welfare.
papers.chineseTitle: 如何利用价格实现高效的在线匹配
papers.chineseAbstract: 许多匹配市场具有未知且动态到达的参与者，这些参与者必须立即进行匹配。例如，社会工作者必须将受虐儿童匹配到寄养家庭，医院必须将危重病人分配到病房，或者城市必须将无家可归者安置到庇护所。本文设计了一种在线匹配算法——序列均衡机制（SEM），该算法通过近似大规模市场均衡来将到达的参与者与对象进行匹配。SEM在概率上具有渐近效率、公平性和策略证明性。本文计划开展一项实地实验，让真实的社会工作者将弱势儿童匹配到寄养家庭，并提供模拟证据表明SEM可以显著提高福利。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 设计SEM算法，提高在线匹配市场效率和福利。

papers.title: Knowledge Compounding: An Empirical Economic Analysis of Self-Evolving Knowledge Wikis under the Agentic ROI Framework
papers.abstract: Building on the Agentic ROI framework proposed by Liu et al. (2026), this paper introduces knowledge compounding as a new measurable concept in the empirical economics of LLM agents and validates it through a controlled four-query experiment on Qing Claw, an industrial-grade C# reimplementation of the OpenClaw multi-agent framework. Our central theoretical claim is that the cost term in the original Agentic ROI equation contains an unexamined assumption -- that the cost of each task is mutually independent. This assumption holds under the traditional retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) paradigm but breaks down once a persistent, structured knowledge layer is introduced. We propose a dynamic Agentic ROI model in which cost is treated as a time-varying function Cost(t) governed by a knowledge-base coverage rate H(t). Empirical results from four sequential queries on the same domain yield a cumulative token consumption of 47K under the compounding regime versus 305K under a matched RAG baseline -- a savings of 84.6%. Calibrated 30-day projections indicate cumulative savings of 53.7% under medium topic concentration and 81.3% under high concentration, with the gap widening monotonically over time. We further identify three microeconomic mechanisms underlying the compounding effect: (i) one-time INGEST amortized over N retrievals, (ii) auto-feedback of high-value answers into synthesis pages, and (iii) write-back of external search results into entity pages. The theoretical contribution of this paper is a recategorization of LLM tokens from consumables to capital goods, shifting the economic discussion from static marginal cost analysis to dynamic capital accumulation. The engineering contribution is a minimal reproducible implementation in approximately 200 lines of C#, which we believe is the first complete industrial-grade reference implementation of Karpathy's (2026) LLM Wiki paradigm.
papers.chineseTitle: 知识复合：代理投资回报率框架下自进化知识维基的实证经济分析
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文基于Liu等人（2026）提出的代理投资回报率（Agentic ROI）框架，引入了知识复合这一新概念，并通过在工业级C#重实现的OpenClaw多代理框架Qing Claw上进行的受控四查询实验对其进行了验证。我们的核心理论观点是，原始Agentic ROI方程中的成本项包含了一个未被审视的假设——即每个任务的成本相互独立。这一假设在传统的检索增强生成（RAG）范式下成立，但一旦引入持久、结构化的知识层，该假设便不再适用。我们提出了一个动态的Agentic ROI模型，其中成本被视为一个由知识库覆盖率H(t)控制的时间变化函数Cost(t)。对同一领域进行的四次连续查询的实证结果显示，在复合制度下，累计令牌消耗量为47K，而在匹配的RAG基线制度下为305K，节省了84.6%。校准后的30天预测表明，在中等主题集中度下累计节省53.7%，在高集中度下节省81.3%，且这一差距随时间单调扩大。我们进一步确定了复合效应背后的三个微观经济机制：（i）一次性摄入（INGEST）在N次检索中的分摊，（ii）高价值答案自动反馈到合成页面中，以及（iii）外部搜索结果回写到实体页面中。本文的理论贡献是将LLM令牌从消耗品重新分类为资本品，将经济讨论从静态边际成本分析转向动态资本积累。工程贡献是用大约200行C#代码实现了一个最小可复现实现，据我们所知，这是Karpathy（2026）LLM Wiki范式的第一个完整的工业级参考实现。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法论较严谨但部分细节待完善，实证充分，影响较大，可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出知识复合概念，重构LLM令牌经济分类，实现动态成本模型。

papers.title: Emulating Stepped-Wedge Cluster Randomized Trials to Evaluate Health Policies and Interventions
papers.abstract: Both cluster randomized trials and quasi-experimental designs are used to evaluate the impact of health and social policies and interventions. Stepped-wedge cluster randomized trials randomize a staggered adoption approach, while recent difference-in-differences methods allow analysis of non-randomized settings where similar policies are adopted at different time points. These approaches have become common, but the sheer variety of methods for analyzing observational studies with staggered adoption makes it challenging to clearly design and report such studies. We propose that observational and quasi-experimental study investigators can address these challenges by emulating stepped-wedge cluster randomized trials in the target trial emulation framework. The conceptual framework and reporting standards of trial emulation will encourage consideration of key features of these designs, such as policy heterogeneity and time-varying effects, and clear reporting of the estimand and assumptions. It also highlights areas where those interested in randomized trials and quasi-experimental designs can benefit from one another's experience by bringing insights across disciplines. Questions of treatment effect heterogeneity, power, spillovers, and anticipation effects, among others, are common to both fields and can benefit from cross-pollination. This article also demonstrates how trial emulation can identify settings that are not well-served by either approach, thereby avoiding studies unlikely to generate high-quality causal evidence. Finally, it informs the bias-variance-generalizability trade-off that arises with design and analysis choices made in these settings, supporting better evidence generation and interpretation in settings where important questions can be answered.
papers.chineseTitle: 模拟阶梯楔形整群随机试验以评估健康政策与干预措施
papers.chineseAbstract: 整群随机试验和准实验设计均被用于评估健康和社会政策及干预措施的影响。阶梯楔形整群随机试验采用交错采用的方法进行随机化，而近期的双重差分法则允许分析在不同时间点采用类似政策的非随机化环境。这些方法已变得普遍，但分析交错采用观察性研究的多种方法使得清晰设计和报告此类研究变得具有挑战性。我们提出，观察性和准实验研究调查人员可以通过在目标试验模拟框架中模拟阶梯楔形整群随机试验来应对这些挑战。试验模拟的概念框架和报告标准将鼓励考虑这些设计的关键特征，如政策异质性和时变效应，并清晰报告估计量和假设。它还强调了那些对随机试验和准实验设计感兴趣的人可以通过跨学科见解相互受益的领域。治疗效应异质性、效力、溢出效应和预期效应等问题是两个领域的共同问题，可以从跨学科交流中受益。本文还展示了试验模拟如何识别两种方法都不适用的环境，从而避免不太可能产生高质量因果证据的研究。最后，它阐述了在这些环境中设计和分析选择所产生的偏差-方差-泛化性权衡，支持在能够回答重要问题的环境中更好地生成和解释证据。
keywords: 阶梯楔形整群随机试验
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文提出了新颖的试验模拟框架，方法论严谨，实证分析较扎实，对健康政策评估有较大影响，且写作清晰。
papers.summary: 提出试验模拟框架以改进健康政策评估方法。

papers.title: Sandpile Economics: Theory, Identification, and Evidence
papers.abstract: Why do capitalist economies recurrently generate crises whose severity is disproportionate to the size of the triggering shock? This paper proposes a structural answer grounded in the evolutionary geometry of production networks. As economies evolve through specialization, integration, and competitive selection, their inter-sectoral linkages drift toward configurations of increasing geometric fragility, eventually crossing a threshold beyond which small disturbances generate disproportionately large cascades.   We introduce Sandpile Economics, a formal framework that interprets macroeconomic instability as an emergent property of disequilibrium production networks. The key state variable is the Forman--Ricci curvature of the input--output graph, capturing local substitution possibilities when supply chains are disrupted. We show that when curvature falls below an endogenous threshold, the distribution of cascade sizes follows a power law with tail index $α\in (1,2)$, implying a regime of unbounded amplification.   The underlying mechanism is evolutionary: specialization reduces input substitutability, pushing the economy toward criticality, while crisis episodes induce endogenous network reconfiguration and path dependence. These dynamics are inherently non-ergodic and cannot be captured by representative-agent frameworks.   Empirically, using global input--output data, we document that production networks operate in persistently negative curvature regimes and that curvature robustly predicts medium-run output dynamics. A one-standard-deviation increase in curvature is associated with higher cumulative growth over three-year horizons, and curvature systematically outperforms standard network metrics in explaining cross-country differences in resilience.
papers.chineseTitle: 沙堆经济学：理论、识别与证据
papers.chineseAbstract: 为何资本主义经济会反复产生危机，且危机的严重程度与触发冲击的规模不成比例？本文基于生产网络的演化几何结构提出了一个结构性答案。随着经济通过专业化、一体化和竞争选择而发展，其部门间联系逐渐趋向于几何脆弱性增加的配置，最终跨越一个阈值，使得小扰动产生不成比例的大规模连锁反应。本文引入了沙堆经济学这一正式框架，将宏观经济的不稳定性解释为非均衡生产网络的一种涌现属性。关键状态变量是投入产出图的Forman-Ricci曲率，该曲率在供应链中断时捕捉局部替代可能性。研究表明，当曲率低于内生阈值时，连锁反应规模的分布遵循幂律分布，尾指数α∈(1,2)，表明存在无界放大机制。其内在机制是演化的：专业化降低了投入替代性，推动经济走向临界状态，而危机事件则引发内生网络重构和路径依赖。这些动态本质上是非遍历的，无法通过代表性主体框架来捕捉。实证上，利用全球投入产出数据，本文发现生产网络持续运行在负曲率状态，且曲率稳健地预测了中期产出动态。曲率每增加一个标准差，与三年期累计增长更高相关，且曲率在解释国家间韧性差异方面系统性地优于标准网络指标。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法论严谨但部分假设需验证，实证充分，影响力较大，可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出沙堆经济学框架，解释宏观经济不稳定性与生产网络几何脆弱性关联。

papers.title: The Revenue Effect of Demand Misspecification in Event Ticket Pricing
papers.abstract: We study a finite-horizon dynamic pricing problem for event tickets with limited inventory and time-varying demand. The central practical difficulty is that the total demand function $L(t)$ is not observed directly and must be estimated from data, while pricing decisions are sensitive to its temporal shape. The paper examines how the accuracy of this estimate affects revenue.   We consider a model in which sales intensity is driven by the total demand $L(t)$, a price-response function $v(p)$, and a time-dependent willingness-to-pay factor $\varphi(t)$. The factor $\varphi(t)$ plays a central role: it captures the increase in customers' willingness to pay as the event date approaches and makes the temporal profile of demand economically important for pricing. Within this framework, the updated numerical study evaluates a benchmark dynamic-programming policy across nine deterministic true-demand scenarios, a collection of feature-aware misspecifications of $L(t)$, and multiple environment regimes induced by $v(p)=e^{-ηp}$, the deadline factor $\varphi(t)$, and inventory level $Q$. The reported summaries are based on stochastic simulation and a ratio-of-means relative-loss metric. The results show that a more accurate representation of the temporal demand profile leads to more effective pricing decisions and higher revenue. Over the full misspecification collection the aggregate relative revenue loss is $0.42\%$, the upper decile exceeds $1\%$, and the most expensive errors are omissions of late-demand components. The average effect is therefore modest but non-negligible, and it becomes stronger when deadline effects are pronounced and inventory is tight.
papers.chineseTitle: 活动门票定价中需求误设对收入的影响
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文研究了有限库存和时间变化需求下活动门票的有限期动态定价问题。核心实践难点在于总需求函数L(t)无法直接观测，必须通过数据估计，而定价决策对其时间形状非常敏感。本文探讨了这种估计的准确性如何影响收入。我们考虑了一个模型，其中销售强度由总需求L(t)、价格响应函数v(p)和时间相关的支付意愿因子φ(t)驱动。因子φ(t)起着关键作用：它捕捉了随着活动日期临近，顾客支付意愿的增加，使得需求的时间分布对定价具有经济重要性。在此框架内，更新的数值研究评估了基准动态规划策略在九种确定性真实需求情景、一系列特征感知的L(t)误设以及由v(p)=e^(-ηp)、截止日期因子φ(t)和库存水平Q引发的多种环境制度下的表现。报告的总结基于随机模拟和均值比相对损失度量。结果表明，更准确的时间需求分布表示会导致更有效的定价决策和更高的收入。在整个误设集合中，总相对收入损失为0.42%，上十分位数超过1%，最昂贵的错误是遗漏了后期需求成分。因此，平均效应虽小但不可忽视，当截止日期效应显著且库存紧张时，这种效应会更强。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在动态定价领域有一定新意，方法严谨，实证充分，但创新性及影响力稍显不足，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 研究需求误设对活动门票定价收入的影响，提出更准确需求表示可提高收入。

papers.title: Statehood Without Capacity
papers.abstract: This paper develops a political-economy theory of statehood without capacity. I argue that under specific institutional and geopolitical conditions, a polity can become trapped in an equilibrium of nominal statehood: a state in which claims to sovereignty, external recognition, and symbolic legitimacy persist or even strengthen while the coercive, fiscal, administrative, and legal capacities required for effective statehood remain weak. The mechanism is driven by three forces. First, fragmented elites may privately benefit from preserving autonomous control, patronage, and localized rent extraction rather than consolidating authority into a unified state. Second, externally mediated transfers can reduce the immediate costs of institutional non-consolidation and thereby stabilize a low-capacity equilibrium. Third, international recognition and symbolic endorsement may be only weakly conditioned on domestic administrative performance, allowing recognition capital to accumulate more rapidly than capacity capital. The theory generates a dynamic divergence between juridical or symbolic statehood and effective statehood, with implications for investment, fiscal fragility, corruption, and vulnerability to conflict shocks. The paper derives testable predictions and then interprets Palestine as a flagship application of the broader mechanism. The central implication is that statehood is not only a question of recognition or territorial claim but an equilibrium outcome of institutional consolidation. Where the incentives to consolidate remain weak, sovereignty may be asserted without becoming viable.
papers.chineseTitle: 有名无实的国家状态
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文构建了一个关于有名无实国家状态的政治经济学理论。我指出，在特定的制度与地缘政治条件下，一个政体可能陷入名义国家状态的均衡陷阱：即一个国家在主权主张、外部承认和象征性合法性方面持续存在甚至加强，但有效国家状态所需的强制、财政、行政和法律能力却依然薄弱。这一机制由三种力量驱动：首先，分裂的精英可能从维护自主控制、庇护关系和本地化租金提取中私下获益，而非将权力整合到一个统一国家中；其次，外部调解的转移支付可以降低制度不整合的直接成本，从而稳定低能力均衡；最后，国际承认和象征性支持可能仅微弱地依赖于国内行政表现，使得承认资本的积累速度快于能力资本。该理论产生了法律或象征性国家状态与有效国家状态之间的动态分歧，对投资、财政脆弱性、腐败和冲突冲击的脆弱性产生影响。本文推导出可检验的预测，并将巴勒斯坦作为这一广泛机制的主要应用案例进行解读。核心含义在于，国家状态不仅是承认或领土主张的问题，而是制度整合的均衡结果。当整合的激励依然薄弱时，主权可能被主张却无法变得可行。
papers.scoreReasoning: 理论创新性强，但实证部分稍显薄弱，方法论规范，可读性较好，影响力较大。
papers.summary: 提出国家状态是制度整合的均衡结果，而非仅依赖承认或领土主张。

papers.title: Gender, Unpaid Work, and Social Norms in Young Italian Families: Evidence from Couples Time Diaries
papers.abstract: Why do large gender inequalities in everyday life persist even as women strengthen their attachment to paid work? Existing evidence shows that women continue to do more unpaid work than men, but much of that evidence is based on individual diaries, says little about how inequality is jointly organized within couples, and rarely links daily time allocation to directly measured gender attitudes. This paper addresses that gap using the TIMES Observatory, an original survey of 1,928 co-resident couples with at least one child younger than 11 in Emilia-Romagna or Campania. The data combine matched partner diaries for one weekday and one weekend day with rich socio-economic information and direct measures of gender norms. We document three main findings. First, women do substantially more unpaid work and spend more time with children, while men do more paid work and enjoy more leisure without children. Second, these asymmetries remain sizeable even among dual full-time couples, implying that stronger female labor-market attachment does not by itself equalize daily life. Third, more traditional gender attitudes - especially among men - are descriptively associated with lower male participation in childcare and domestic work and with wider gaps in discretionary leisure. The analysis is descriptive rather than causal, but it shows that gender inequality within couples is visible not only in the amount of work performed, but also in the distribution of time that is genuinely discretionary.
papers.chineseTitle: 意大利年轻家庭中的性别、无偿劳动与社会规范：来自夫妻时间日记的证据
papers.chineseAbstract: 为何在日常生活中，尽管女性加强了对有偿工作的依附，但性别不平等现象依然严重？现有证据表明，女性继续承担比男性更多的无偿劳动，但这些证据大多基于个人日记，很少涉及夫妻内部如何共同组织不平等，也很少将每日时间分配与直接测量的性别态度联系起来。本文利用TIMES观测站的数据填补了这一空白，该观测站对艾米利亚-罗马涅或坎帕尼亚地区1928对至少有一个11岁以下子女的同居夫妻进行了原创性调查。数据结合了匹配的伴侣日记（一个工作日和一个周末日）以及丰富的社会经济信息和直接测量的性别规范。我们记录了三个主要发现。首先，女性承担了更多的无偿劳动，并花更多时间陪伴孩子，而男性则从事更多有偿工作，并在没有孩子的情况下享受更多休闲时间。其次，即使在双全职夫妻中，这些不对称性仍然显著，这意味着女性劳动力市场依附的增强本身并不能使日常生活平等化。第三，更传统的性别态度——尤其是男性中的——与男性在育儿和家务劳动中的参与度较低，以及在自由支配休闲时间方面的差距更大有关。分析是描述性的而非因果性的，但它表明，夫妻内部的性别不平等不仅体现在工作量上，还体现在真正自由支配时间的分配上。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文选题新颖，实证较扎实，但方法论创新性一般，影响力尚待观察。
papers.summary: 揭示意大利年轻夫妻中性别不平等在时间分配上的表现及影响因素。

papers.title: Causal Diffusion Models for Counterfactual Outcome Distributions in Longitudinal Data
papers.abstract: Predicting counterfactual outcomes in longitudinal data, where sequential treatment decisions heavily depend on evolving patient states, is critical yet notoriously challenging due to complex time-dependent confounding and inadequate uncertainty quantification in existing methods. We introduce the Causal Diffusion Model (CDM), the first denoising diffusion probabilistic approach explicitly designed to generate full probabilistic distributions of counterfactual outcomes under sequential interventions. CDM employs a novel residual denoising architecture with relational self-attention, capturing intricate temporal dependencies and multimodal outcome trajectories without requiring explicit adjustments (e.g., inverse-probability weighting or adversarial balancing) for confounding. In rigorous evaluation on a pharmacokinetic-pharmacodynamic tumor-growth simulator widely adopted in prior work, CDM consistently outperforms state-of-the-art longitudinal causal inference methods, achieving a 15-30% relative improvement in distributional accuracy (1-Wasserstein distance) while maintaining competitive or superior point-estimate accuracy (RMSE) under high-confounding regimes. By unifying uncertainty quantification and robust counterfactual prediction in complex, sequentially confounded settings, without tailored deconfounding, CDM offers a flexible, high-impact tool for decision support in medicine, policy evaluation, and other longitudinal domains.
papers.chineseTitle: 纵向数据中反事实结果分布的因果扩散模型
papers.chineseAbstract: 在纵向数据中预测反事实结果，其中连续的治疗决策高度依赖于不断变化的患者状态，这一任务至关重要，但由于复杂的时间依赖性混杂和现有方法中不确定性量化的不足，这一任务极具挑战性。本文引入了因果扩散模型（CDM），这是首个明确设计用于在连续干预下生成反事实结果完整概率分布的去噪扩散概率方法。CDM采用了一种新颖的残差去噪架构，结合关系自注意力机制，能够捕捉复杂的时间依赖性和多模态结果轨迹，而无需对混杂进行显式调整（例如，逆概率加权或对抗性平衡）。在先前研究中广泛采用的药代动力学-药效学肿瘤生长模拟器上的严格评估中，CDM始终优于最先进的纵向因果推断方法，在高混杂情况下，分布准确性（1-Wasserstein距离）相对提高了15-30%，同时保持了具有竞争力或更优的点估计准确性（RMSE）。通过在复杂、连续混杂的环境中统一不确定性量化和稳健的反事实预测，而无需定制的去混杂方法，CDM为医学决策支持、政策评估和其他纵向领域提供了一个灵活、高影响力的工具。
papers.scoreReasoning: 模型创新性强，方法严谨，实证较充分，对纵向因果推断领域影响较大，写作清晰。
papers.summary: 提出CDM模型，提升纵向数据反事实预测的分布准确性。

papers.title: Shock, Communication, and Yield Curve Repricing: A Two-Step Empirical Framework for Copom Events in Brazil
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a two-step empirical framework to study the repricing of the Brazilian DI curve around Copom-related events. The empirical strategy separates the initial market reaction associated with the underlying shock from the subsequent repricing observed between the shock and the first Copom statement that follows it. The dataset combines a hand-built event calendar, daily market data, Focus expectations, and structured textual features extracted from Copom statements, including tone, forward-guidance direction and explicitness, and uncertainty indicators. In the updated sample, 59 events retain both analytical windows, allowing the second stage to include the full set of same-day Copom events. Baseline results suggest that the framework is most informative at the front and intermediate sections of the curve, especially for the DI 252d maturity, for which the baseline OLS specification reaches an in-sample R2 of about 0.43. By contrast, explanatory power is materially weaker for the DI 504d maturity and for slope adjustments, and out-of-sample performance remains limited. The textual variables display economically plausible signs, but their statistical contribution is not uniformly robust across specifications. The main contribution of the paper is therefore methodological and applied: it offers an implementable event-based decomposition for assessing how shocks and Copom communication jointly shape curve dynamics in Brazil.
papers.chineseTitle: 冲击、沟通与收益率曲线重定价：巴西Copom事件的两步实证框架
papers.chineseAbstract: 本文提出了一个两步实证框架，用于研究巴西DI曲线在Copom相关事件前后的重定价过程。该实证策略将与基础冲击相关的初始市场反应，与冲击发生后至首次Copom声明发布期间观察到的后续重定价过程相分离。研究数据集结合了手工构建的事件日历、每日市场数据、Focus预期以及从Copom声明中提取的结构化文本特征，包括语气、前瞻指引方向与明确性以及不确定性指标。在更新后的样本中，59个事件保留了完整的分析窗口，使得第二阶段能够纳入所有同日Copom事件。基准结果表明，该框架在曲线前端和中间部分最具信息性，特别是对于DI 252天期限，基准OLS模型的样本内R²达到约0.43。相比之下，对于DI 504天期限和斜率调整的解释力明显较弱，样本外表现也有限。文本变量显示出经济上合理的符号，但其统计贡献在不同模型中并不一致稳健。因此，本文的主要贡献在于方法论和应用层面：它提供了一个可实施的事件驱动分解方法，用于评估冲击和Copom沟通如何共同塑造巴西的曲线动态。
papers.scoreReasoning: 方法论创新性强，实证较扎实，但影响力和文本变量贡献稍弱。
papers.summary: 提出两步实证框架，评估冲击与Copom沟通对巴西曲线动态的共同影响。

papers.title: Deepbullwhip: An Open-Source Simulation and Benchmarking for Multi-Echelon Bullwhip Analyses
papers.abstract: The bullwhip effect remains operationally persistent despite decades of analytical research. Two computational deficiencies hinder progress: the absence of modular open-source simulation tools for multi-echelon inventory dynamics with asymmetric costs, and the lack of a standardized benchmarking protocol for comparing mitigation strategies across shared metrics and datasets. This paper introduces deepbullwhip, an open-source Python package that integrates a simulation engine for serial supply chains (with pluggable demand generators, ordering policies, and cost functions via abstract base classes, and a vectorized Monte Carlo engine achieving 50 to 90 times speedup) with a registry-based benchmarking framework shipping a curated catalog of ordering policies, forecasting methods, six bullwhip metrics, and demand datasets including WSTS semiconductor billings. Five sets of experiments on a four-echelon semiconductor chain demonstrate cumulative amplification of 427x (Monte Carlo mean across 1,000 paths), a stochastic filtering phenomenon at upstream tiers (CV = 0.01), super-exponential lead time sensitivity, and scalability to 20.8 million simulation cells in under 7 seconds. Benchmark experiments reveal a 155x disparity between synthetic AR(1) and real WSTS bullwhip severity under the Order-Up-To policy, and quantify the BWR-NSAmp tradeoff across ordering policies, demonstrating that no single metric captures policy quality.
papers.chineseTitle: 深度牛鞭效应：多级牛鞭效应分析的开源模拟与基准测试
papers.chineseAbstract: 尽管经过数十年的分析研究，牛鞭效应在运营中仍然持续存在。两个计算缺陷阻碍了进展：一是缺乏针对具有不对称成本的多级库存动态的模块化开源模拟工具，二是缺乏用于比较不同缓解策略的标准化基准测试协议，这些策略需基于共享的指标和数据集。本文介绍了deepbullwhip，这是一个开源的Python软件包，它将一个用于串行供应链的模拟引擎（通过抽象基类实现可插拔的需求生成器、订购策略和成本函数，以及一个实现50至90倍加速的向量化蒙特卡洛引擎）与一个基于注册表的基准测试框架相结合，该框架提供了一个精心策划的订购策略目录、预测方法、六个牛鞭效应指标以及包括WSTS半导体账单在内的需求数据集。在四级半导体供应链上进行的五组实验表明，累积放大效应达到427倍（1000条路径的蒙特卡洛平均值），上游层级出现随机过滤现象（CV=0.01），超指数级前置时间敏感性，以及在不到7秒内扩展到2080万个模拟单元的能力。基准测试实验揭示了在订购至上限策略下，合成AR(1)与真实WSTS牛鞭效应严重程度之间存在155倍的差异，并量化了不同订购策略之间的BWR-NSAmp权衡，表明没有单一指标能够全面捕捉策略质量。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在方法论和实证上表现出色，但可读性稍弱，创新性显著但非突破性。
papers.summary: 提出开源工具deepbullwhip，用于多级牛鞭效应模拟与基准测试。

papers.title: A Diagnostics-First Composite Index for Macro-Financial Resilience to Socioeconomic Challenges: The Gondauri Index with Benchmarking and Scenario Evidence
papers.abstract: In the face of socioeconomic challenges, this paper develops and empirically demonstrates the Gondauri Index (GI) as a reproducible diagnostics-first composite framework for benchmarking macro-financial resilience across heterogeneous economies on a unified 0-100 scale. The GI addresses a key limitation of conventional surveillance dashboards: resilience is multi-dimensional and only partially substitutable, so strength in one area cannot sustainably offset fragility in another. The index integrates three interpretable pillars: Inequality Resilience Score (IRS), Liquidity and Systemic Resilience (LNSR), and Inflation Forecast Coherence (IFC). Cross-country comparability is ensured through robust percentile normalization (p5-p95), a consistent annual country-year design, and explicit missing-data handling via component-level weight renormalization. Empirically, the paper provides a 2024 benchmark snapshot and dynamic evidence for 2005-2024 using 5-year rolling diagnostics and Delta log(GI) contribution decomposition, allowing transparent attribution of resilience changes to pillar-level drivers. A forward-looking extension constructs 2026-2030 scenario pathways and introduces a binding-pillar diagnostic that identifies the dominant constraint on resilience across horizons. Overall, the GI offers a scalable tool for comparative resilience assessment, early-warning diagnostics, and evidence-based policy sequencing.
papers.chineseTitle: 面向社会经济挑战的宏观金融韧性诊断优先综合指数：Gondauri指数及其基准和情景证据
papers.chineseAbstract: 面对社会经济挑战，本文开发并实证演示了Gondauri指数（GI），这是一种可复制的诊断优先综合框架，用于在统一的0-100尺度上对不同经济体的宏观金融韧性进行基准比较。GI解决了传统监测仪表板的一个关键局限性：韧性是多维的且仅部分可替代，因此一个领域的优势无法持续抵消另一个领域的脆弱性。该指数整合了三个可解释的支柱：不平等韧性得分（IRS）、流动性与系统性韧性（LNSR）和通胀预测一致性（IFC）。通过稳健的百分位数归一化（p5-p95）、一致的年度国家年份设计和通过组件级权重重新归一化明确处理缺失数据，确保了跨国可比性。实证上，本文提供了2024年的基准快照和2005-2024年的动态证据，使用5年滚动诊断和Delta log(GI)贡献分解，允许将韧性变化透明地归因于支柱级驱动因素。前瞻性扩展构建了2026-2030年的情景路径，并引入了约束性支柱诊断，以识别跨时间范围对韧性的主要约束。总体而言，GI为比较韧性评估、早期预警诊断和基于证据的政策排序提供了一个可扩展的工具。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在宏观金融韧性评估方法上有显著创新，方法严谨，实证充分，但影响力尚待观察。
papers.summary: 提出Gondauri指数，为宏观金融韧性评估提供新工具。

papers.title: Structural Consequences of Policy-Based Interventions on the Global Supply Chain Network
papers.abstract: As global political tensions rise and the anticipation of additional tariffs from the United States on international trade increases, the issues of economic independence and supply chain resilience become more prominent. The importance of supply chain resilience has been further underscored by disruptions caused by the COVID-19 pandemic and the ongoing war in Ukraine. In light of these challenges, ranging from geopolitical instability to product supply uncertainties, governments are increasingly focused on adopting new trade policies. This study explores the impact of several of these policies on the global electric vehicle (EV) supply chain network, with a particular focus on their effects on country clusters and the broader structure of international trade. Specifically, we analyse three key policies: Country Plus One, Friendshoring, and Reshoring. Our findings show that Friendshoring, contrary to expectations, leads to greater globalisation by increasing the number of supply links across friendly countries, potentially raising transaction costs. The Country Plus One policy similarly enhances network density through redundant links, while the Reshoring policy creates challenges in the EV sector due to the high number of irreplaceable products. Additionally, the effects of these policies vary across industries; for instance, mining goods being less affected in Country Plus One than the Friendshoring policy.
papers.chineseTitle: 政策干预对全球供应链网络的结构性影响
papers.chineseAbstract: 随着全球政治紧张局势的加剧以及美国对国际贸易增加额外关税的预期上升，经济独立性和供应链韧性问题变得愈发突出。COVID-19疫情和乌克兰持续战争所造成的供应链中断进一步凸显了供应链韧性的重要性。面对从地缘政治不稳定到产品供应不确定性的种种挑战，各国政府越来越关注采用新的贸易政策。本研究探讨了其中几项政策对全球电动汽车（EV）供应链网络的影响，特别关注它们对国家集群和国际贸易更广泛结构的影响。具体而言，我们分析了三项关键政策：国家加一政策、友岸外包政策和回岸外包政策。我们的研究结果显示，与预期相反，友岸外包政策通过增加友好国家之间的供应联系数量，导致更大程度的全球化，可能提高交易成本。国家加一政策同样通过冗余联系增强了网络密度，而回岸外包政策则由于大量不可替代产品的存在，在电动汽车行业造成了挑战。此外，这些政策的影响因行业而异；例如，与友岸外包政策相比，国家加一政策对采矿产品的影响较小。
papers.scoreReasoning: 研究选题新颖，方法规范但创新性不足，实证较扎实，对政策影响分析有一定深度，写作清晰。
papers.summary: 分析政策干预对全球电动汽车供应链网络的结构性影响。

papers.title: Daycare Matching with Siblings: Social Implementation and Welfare Evaluation
papers.abstract: In centralized assignment problems, agents may have preferences over joint rather than individual assignments, such as couples in residency matching or siblings in school choice and daycare. Standard preference estimation methods typically ignore such complementarities. This paper develops an empirical framework that explicitly incorporates them. Using data from daycare assignment in a municipality in Japan, we estimate a model in which families incur both additional commuting distance and a fixed non-distance disutility when siblings are assigned to different facilities. We find that split assignment generates a large disutility, equivalent to more than twice the average commuting distance. We then simulate counterfactual assignment policies that vary the strength of sibling priority and evaluate welfare. The sibling priority reform that we designed and that was implemented in 2024 increases welfare by 6.4% while reducing inequality in assignment rates across sibling groups; models that ignore sibling complementarities substantially understate these gains. At the same time, we uncover a clear efficiency-equity tradeoff: along the frontier, increasing mean welfare by 100 meters is associated with an increase in inequality of about 1.7 percentage points, and the welfare-maximizing policy reverses much of the reform's reduction in inequality, largely through the displacement of households without siblings.
papers.chineseTitle: 有兄弟姐妹的日托匹配：社会实施与福利评估
papers.chineseAbstract: 在集中分配问题中，代理人可能对联合分配而非个体分配有偏好，例如住院医生匹配中的夫妇或学校选择和日托中的兄弟姐妹。标准的偏好估计方法通常忽略这种互补性。本文开发了一个明确纳入这种互补性的实证框架。利用日本某市日托分配的数据，我们估计了一个模型，其中当兄弟姐妹被分配到不同设施时，家庭会承担额外的通勤距离和固定的非距离负效用。我们发现，分开分配会产生巨大的负效用，相当于平均通勤距离的两倍多。然后，我们模拟了不同强度的兄弟姐妹优先权的反事实分配政策，并评估了福利。我们设计并于2024年实施的兄弟姐妹优先权改革使福利提高了6.4%，同时减少了兄弟姐妹组间分配率的不平等；忽略兄弟姐妹互补性的模型大大低估了这些收益。同时，我们发现了一个明显的效率-公平权衡：在前沿上，平均福利每增加100米，不平等增加约1.7个百分点，而福利最大化政策在很大程度上通过取代没有兄弟姐妹的家庭，逆转了改革的大部分不平等减少。
papers.scoreReasoning: 论文在日托匹配领域有显著创新，方法严谨，实证充分，但可读性稍弱。
papers.summary: 提出考虑兄弟姐妹互补性的日托匹配模型，评估了相关政策。

papers.title: Partial Identification of Policy-Relevant Treatment Effects with Instrumental Variables via Optimal Transport
papers.abstract: Policy-Relevant Treatment Effects (PRTEs) are generally not point-identified under standard instrumental variable (IV) assumptions when the instrument generates limited support in treatment propensity. Existing approaches typically optimize over marginal treatment response functions subject to moment restrictions and can discard identifying distributional information. We show that PRTE partial identification in the generalized Roy model can instead be formulated as a Constrained Conditional Optimal Transport (CCOT) problem. The resulting multidimensional CCOT problem reduces analytically to separable one-dimensional OT problems with product costs, yielding sharp closed-form bounds and avoiding direct solution of the original high-dimensional CCOT problem. We also develop estimation and inference procedures for these bounds: for discrete instruments, a Double Machine Learning (DML) approach based on Neyman-orthogonal scores that accommodates high-dimensional covariates while achieving the parametric $\sqrt{n}$ rate and asymptotic normality; for continuous instruments, we explicitly characterize the corresponding nonparametric convergence rates. The framework accommodates covariates, discrete and continuous instruments, and extensions to general treatment settings. In simulations and a bed-net subsidy application, the resulting bounds are substantially tighter than existing moment-relaxation methods.
papers.chineseTitle: 通过最优传输利用工具变量对政策相关处理效应的部分识别
papers.chineseAbstract: 在标准工具变量假设下，当工具变量在处理倾向性上产生的支持有限时，政策相关处理效应（PRTEs）通常无法被精确识别。现有方法通常在满足矩限制的条件下对边际处理响应函数进行优化，但可能会忽略识别分布信息。本文表明，广义Roy模型中的PRTE部分识别可以转化为约束条件下的条件最优传输（CCOT）问题。由此产生的多维CCOT问题在解析上可简化为具有乘积成本的可分离一维最优传输（OT）问题，从而得出精确的闭式边界，并避免了直接求解原始的高维CCOT问题。本文还为这些边界开发了估计和推断程序：对于离散工具变量，采用基于Neyman正交分数的双重机器学习（DML）方法，该方法能够处理高维协变量，同时实现参数的√n收敛速度和渐近正态性；对于连续工具变量，本文明确刻画了相应的非参数收敛速度。该框架适用于协变量、离散和连续工具变量，并可扩展至一般处理设置。在模拟和蚊帐补贴应用中，所得边界比现有的矩松弛方法更为紧凑。
keywords: 约束条件下的条件最优传输
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，但可读性一般。
papers.summary: 提出CCOT方法，显著改进PRTE部分识别。

papers.title: Distributional Change in Ordinal Data with Missing Observations: Minimal Mobility and Partial Identification
papers.abstract: Empirical analyses often compare distributions of ordinal variables across groups or over time using repeated cross-sectional data, where only marginal distributions are observed and missing data are pervasive. As a result, the joint distribution linking these marginals is not identified, making it difficult to assess how observed differences arise. This paper studies how distributional change can be measured and interpreted under such limited information. I show that the $L_1$ distance between cumulative distribution functions admits an optimal transport representation as the minimal reallocation of probability mass across ordered categories. This representation delivers both a scalar measure of discrepancy and a structured description of how distributional change must occur, which I refer to as minimal-mobility configurations. To address missing data, I adopt a partial identification approach and construct sharp bounds on the marginal distributions. These bounds induce identified sets for both the discrepancy measure and the associated minimal-mobility configurations, providing inference that is robust to nonresponse and a transparent basis for assessing sensitivity to missing data. An empirical illustration using data from the \emph{Arab Barometer} demonstrates how the framework can be used in practice to quantify and interpret distributional change under limited information.
papers.chineseTitle: 缺失观测下序数数据的分布变化：最小迁移与部分识别
papers.chineseAbstract: 实证分析常使用重复横截面数据比较序数变量在不同组别或时间上的分布，其中仅观察到边际分布且缺失数据普遍存在。由于连接这些边际分布的联合分布无法识别，因此难以评估观察到的差异如何产生。本文研究了在有限信息下如何测量和解释分布变化。作者表明，累积分布函数之间的L1距离具有最优传输表示，即有序类别间概率质量的最小重新分配。这种表示既提供了差异的标量度量，又提供了分布变化必须发生的结构化描述，作者称之为最小迁移配置。为解决缺失数据问题，作者采用部分识别方法，并构建边际分布的尖锐界限。这些界限为差异度量及相关最小迁移配置诱导了识别集合，提供了对无应答具有鲁棒性的推断，并为评估缺失数据的敏感性提供了透明基础。使用《阿拉伯晴雨表》数据的实证示例展示了如何在实践中应用该框架，在有限信息下量化和解释分布变化。
papers.scoreReasoning: 创新性显著，方法严谨，实证较扎实，影响较大，可读性较好。
papers.summary: 提出最小迁移配置，解决缺失数据下序数分布变化识别问题。

papers.title: Effects of interviewers on response to income and wealth items
papers.abstract: Item nonresponse to financial questions is a persistent source of survey error, especially in interviewer-administered surveys. We examine whether interviewers' expectations about respondents' willingness to report income are associated with actual item responses to income and asset questions in Wave 6 of the Survey of Health, Ageing and Retirement in Europe (SHARE). Using data from 41,934 respondents in 12 countries, linked to interviewer survey and roster information, we analyze responses to four financial items with substantial nonresponse. We compare three approaches to handling missing covariates: complete-case analysis, multiple imputation (fill-in methods), and a generalized missing-indicator framework with information-criterion-based model averaging. Across most specifications, respondents interviewed by interviewers with higher expected income response rates are more likely to provide financial information. However, model averaging does not yield clear gains over simpler approaches. The results suggest that interviewer expectations contain useful information for understanding and modeling item nonresponse to sensitive financial items, with potential implications for interviewer training and survey fieldwork design.
papers.chineseTitle: 访谈者对收入和财富问题回答的影响
papers.chineseAbstract: 在财务问题的调查中，项目无应答是导致调查误差的一个持续存在的来源，特别是在访谈者主导的调查中。本文研究了在欧洲健康、老龄化和退休调查（SHARE）第六波数据中，访谈者对受访者报告收入意愿的预期是否与受访者对收入和资产问题的实际项目回答相关联。利用来自12个国家41,934名受访者的数据，结合访谈者调查和名册信息，我们分析了四个具有显著无应答的财务项目的回答情况。我们比较了处理缺失协变量的三种方法：完整案例分析、多重插补（填充方法）以及基于信息准则模型平均的广义缺失指标框架。在大多数设定下，由预期收入回答率较高的访谈者采访的受访者更有可能提供财务信息。然而，模型平均并未显示出比简单方法更明显的优势。结果表明，访谈者预期包含了有助于理解和建模敏感财务项目无应答的有用信息，这对访谈者培训和调查实地工作设计具有潜在影响。
papers.scoreReasoning: 研究具有一定创新性，方法严谨，实证较扎实，但影响力和创新性稍显不足。
papers.summary: 访谈者预期影响受访者财务信息提供，对调查设计有启示。

papers.title: Latent community paths in VAR-type models via dynamic directed spectral co-clustering
papers.abstract: This paper proposes a dynamic network framework for uncovering latent community paths in high-dimensional VAR-type models. By embedding a degree-corrected stochastic co-blockmodel (ScBM) into the transition matrices of VAR-type systems, we separate sending and receiving roles at the node level and summarize complex directional dependence in an interpretable low-dimensional form. Our method integrates directed spectral co-clustering with eigenvector smoothing to track how directional groups split, merge, or persist over time. This framework accommodates both periodic VAR (PVAR) models for cyclical seasonal evolution and generalized VHAR models for structural transitions across ordered dependence horizons. We establish non-asymptotic misclassification bounds for both procedures and provide supporting evidence through Monte Carlo experiments. Applications to U.S.\ nonfarm payrolls distinguish a recurrent business-centered core from more mobile, seasonally sensitive sectors. In global stock volatilities, the results reveal a compact U.S.-centered long-horizon block, a Europe-heavy developed core, and a more dynamic short-horizon reallocation of peripheral and bridge markets.
papers.chineseTitle: 通过动态有向谱共聚类在VAR类型模型中揭示潜在社区路径
